title: The emotion dysregulation inventory - self-report: development and psychometric evaluation.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Emotion dysregulation is a transdiagnostic construct associated with multiple mental health conditions and shown to be an amenable target for treatment. The original Emotion Dysregulation Inventory (EDI) was created as a proxy-report measure validated in autistic and nonautistic youth. The goal of the current study was to develop a self-report version, the EDI-Self-Report (EDI-SR), that captures a first-person perspective and creates the option of multi-reporter measurement from adolescence through adulthood.
METHODS: Using methods developed by the Patient-Reported Outcomes Measurement Information System (PROMIS), potential items and response options were written and tested in cognitive interviews. Two samples (996 participants who are autistic or have other intellectual and developmental disabilities and 1,000 participants selected to be representative of the US census as a nonclinical comparison group) completed the initial item pool. Items were assessed using exploratory and confirmatory factor analyses, item response theory analyses, concurrent calibrations, convergent correlations with comparable legacy measures, internal consistency reliability, and test-retest reliability.
RESULTS: Exploratory factor analyses suggested splitting Reactivity and Dysphoria items for confirmatory factor analyses and subsequent analyses. Following analyses, a 25-item Reactivity scale, a 7-item Dysphoria scale, and a 6-item Reactivity short-form scale were finalized. EDI-SR subscales showed convergent validity and superior total information when compared with similar measures, strong internal consistency reliability, and good test-retest reliability.
CONCLUSIONS: The EDI-SR provides an efficient, precise measure of ED in autistic individuals, individuals with other intellectual and developmental disabilities, and a US census-matched representative sample, and allows for multi-reporter assessment in clinical and research contexts.

标题：情绪失调量表-自评版：开发与心理测量学评估
摘要：背景：情绪失调是一种跨诊断的建构，与多种心理健康状况相关，并且已被证明是治疗的可干预靶点。原始的情绪失调量表（EDI）是作为代理报告量表开发的，并在自闭症及非自闭症青少年中进行了验证。本研究的目的是开发一个自评版本，即情绪失调量表-自评版（EDI-SR），以捕捉第一人称视角，并建立从青春期到成年期的多报告者测量选项。方法：采用患者报告结局测量信息系统（PROMIS）开发的方法，编写潜在条目和反应选项，并在认知访谈中进行测试。两个样本（996名患有自闭症或其他智力与发育障碍的参与者，以及1000名选自美国人口普查代表性样本的非临床对照参与者）完成了初始条目库。使用探索性和验证性因子分析、项目反应理论分析、同步校准、与同类传统测量的收敛效度相关性、内部一致性信度以及重测信度对条目进行了评估。结果：探索性因子分析建议在验证性因子分析及后续分析中将反应性和烦躁量表分离。分析后，最终确定了包含25个条目的反应性量表、7个条目的烦躁量表以及6个条目的反应性简版量表。EDI-SR子量表在与类似测量比较时显示出收敛效度、更优的总信息量、良好的内部一致性信度以及较好的重测信度。结论：EDI-SR为自闭症患者、其他智力与发育障碍患者以及美国人口普查匹配的代表性样本提供了高效、精确的情绪失调测量，并允许在临床和研究背景下进行多报告者评估。
关键词：情绪失调；心理测量学评估；自我报告量表；自闭症；项目反应理论

title: Symptom severity, neighborhood crime, and neural correlates of reappraisal in patients with major depression and social anxiety.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Cognitive reappraisal deficits are a transdiagnostic risk factor for major depressive disorder (MDD) and social anxiety disorder (SAD) and are observed in patients with these disorders at the neural level. Preliminary research suggests less activation of prefrontal regions during reappraisal (vs. viewing) of negative stimuli associates with overall symptom severity in patients with MDD or SAD, however, this is not reliably observed across studies. Consistent with research showing that reappraisal may only be adaptive when employed to cope with uncontrollable adversity, this study sought to examine whether neighborhood-level adversity (i.e. socioeconomic disadvantage, crime) moderated the relation between internalizing symptom severity and neural correlates of reappraisal.
METHODS: This study included patients with a current diagnosis of MDD (n = 51) or SAD (n = 39). Patients completed measures of symptom severity as well as an emotion regulation task while in the scanner to assess neural activation during reappraisal. Patients' addresses were geocoded to assess neighborhood socioeconomic disadvantage and crime.
RESULTS: Results indicated that greater symptom severity was associated with decreased activation of key prefrontal regions underlying reappraisal, but only for patients living in neighborhoods characterized by high levels of personal (i.e. violent) crime. Unexpectedly, the opposite was found for patients living in low-crime neighborhoods, such that greater symptom severity was associated with increased neural activation during reappraisal (vs. viewing) of negative stimuli.
CONCLUSIONS: Findings highlight the critical importance of considering patients' neighborhood contexts when evaluating associations between symptom severity and neural correlates of reappraisal in patients with internalizing disorders.

标题：抑郁症和社交焦虑症患者的症状严重程度、社区犯罪与重新评估的神经关联
摘要：背景：认知重新评估缺陷是重度抑郁症（MDD）和社交焦虑症（SAD）的跨诊断风险因素，并在神经层面观察于这些患者中。初步研究表明，在重新评估（相对于观看）负面刺激时，前额叶区域的激活减少与MDD或SAD患者的整体症状严重程度相关，但这一结果在不同研究中并非稳定出现。与重新评估仅在应对不可控逆境时可能具有适应性的研究一致，本研究旨在探讨社区层面的逆境（即社会经济劣势、犯罪）是否调节内化症状严重程度与重新评估的神经关联之间的关系。方法：本研究纳入当前诊断为MDD（n=51）或SAD（n=39）的患者。患者在扫描仪中完成症状严重程度测量以及一项情绪调节任务，以评估重新评估期间的神经激活。患者的地址被地理编码用于评估社区社会经济劣势和犯罪率。结果：结果表明，症状严重程度越高，与重新评估相关的关键前额叶区域激活越低，但仅适用于生活在高个人犯罪（即暴力犯罪）社区的患者。出乎意料的是，在低犯罪社区的患者中发现了相反结果：症状严重程度越高，在重新评估（相对于观看）负面刺激时神经激活越强。结论：研究结果强调了在评估内化障碍患者症状严重程度与重新评估神经关联时，考虑患者社区背景的关键重要性。
关键词：认知重新评估；抑郁症；社交焦虑症；社区犯罪；神经影像学

title: Moderators and predictors of treatment outcome for OCD: A comparison of cognitive behavioral therapy Exposure Response Prevention to Acceptance and Commitment Therapy.
summary:
AIM: This study examined theory-driven predictors and moderators of treatment outcomes in group-based cognitive behavioral therapy with exposure and response prevention (CBT/ERP) and acceptance and commitment therapy (ACT) for obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD).
METHOD: A total of 176 adults diagnosed with OCD according to DSM-5 criteria were randomized to either group-based CBT/ERP or ACT. Participants received 14 weekly sessions and were assessed using clinical interviews at baseline, post-treatment, and 6- and 12-month follow-ups.
RESULTS: Anxiety sensitivity, experiential avoidance, and emotion regulation difficulties significantly moderated treatment response, with individuals high on these dimensions benefiting more from CBT/ERP than ACT.
CONCLUSION: These findings were contrary to our hypotheses and underline the importance of investigating the active mechanisms of ACT. Additionally, group therapeutic alliance predicted and moderated treatment outcomes across both interventions.
CLINICAL OR METHODOLOGICAL SIGNIFICANCE OF THIS ARTICLE: This study provides preliminary evidence that anxiety sensitivity, experiential avoidance, and emotion regulation difficulties significantly moderated treatment response, with individuals scoring higher on these dimensions deriving greater benefit from CBT/ERP compared with ACT. These findings were contrary to our hypotheses and underscore the need for further investigation into the mechanisms of action underlying ACT. In addition, group therapeutic alliance moderated outcomes across both interventions.

标题：强迫症治疗结果的调节变量与预测变量：认知行为暴露反应预防疗法与接纳承诺疗法的比较
摘要：目的：本研究考察了基于理论的预测变量和调节变量，这些变量影响针对强迫症（OCD）的团体认知行为暴露反应预防疗法（CBT/ERP）和接纳承诺疗法（ACT）的治疗结果。方法：共176名符合DSM-5诊断标准的强迫症成人患者被随机分配至团体CBT/ERP或ACT组。参与者接受14周治疗，并在基线、治疗后、6个月和12个月随访时通过临床访谈进行评估。结果：焦虑敏感性、经验回避和情绪调节困难显著调节了治疗反应，即在这些维度上得分较高的个体从CBT/ERP中获益多于ACT。结论：这些发现与我们的假设相反，并强调了研究ACT主动机制的重要性。此外，团体治疗联盟在两种干预措施中均预测并调节了治疗结果。本文的临床或方法论意义：本研究提供了初步证据，表明焦虑敏感性、经验回避和情绪调节困难显著调节了治疗反应，在这些维度上得分较高的个体从CBT/ERP中比从ACT中获得更大益处。这些发现与我们的假设相反，并强调需要进一步研究ACT的作用机制。此外，团体治疗联盟在两种干预措施中均调节了结果。

关键词：强迫症；情绪调节；焦虑敏感性；经验回避；认知行为疗法

title: Network Control Theory in Personalized Intervention Selection: A Proof-of-Concept Approach to Simulating Therapeutic Intervention Effects in Clinical Time-Series Data.
summary: Network Control Theory (NCT) is concerned with the control of dynamic complex systems, allowing the modeling and assessing of (theoretical) intervention effects. This study presents a proof-of-concept approach for applying NCT in a process-oriented manner to ecological momentary assessment (EMA) data from patients. We applied a linear dynamic system model (LDS) using ridge regression to pretreatment time-series data of 20 patients with depression or anxiety (Δdata points/person = 96). Effects of 31 therapeutic interventions were simulated based on nomothetic knowledge and expert group consensus. Two NCT metrics were applied: average controllability (AC), indexing an intervention's theoretical effect over the system, and cumulative impulse response (CIR), indexing theoretical magnitude and direction of change per variable. Certain nodes exhibited elevated controllability. In exemplar cases, NCT-derived recommendations seemed to differ from the interventions actually received. Theoretical controllability varied across interventions, with some showing consistently higher controllability across patients. This proof-of-concept approach demonstrates how NCT can, in principle, be applied via process-oriented intervention simulations. However, its current application rests on idealized assumptions. Whether identified interventions are clinically meaningful needs empirical testing. We highlight opportunities for NCT research and discuss critical next steps toward empirically refining estimations of intervention effects.

标题：网络控制理论在个性化干预选择中的应用：一种在临床时间序列数据中模拟治疗干预效果的概念验证方法
摘要：网络控制理论（NCT）关注动态复杂系统的控制，允许建模和评估（理论上的）干预效果。本研究提出了一种概念验证方法，以过程导向的方式将NCT应用于患者的生态瞬时评估（EMA）数据。我们应用了基于岭回归的线性动态系统模型（LDS），对20名抑郁或焦虑患者的治疗前时间序列数据（数据点/人=96）进行分析。基于群体常模知识和专家群体共识，模拟了31种治疗干预的效果。应用了两个NCT指标：平均可控性（AC），用于衡量干预对系统的理论效果；以及累积脉冲响应（CIR），用于衡量每个变量变化的理论幅度和方向。某些节点表现出较高的可控性。在示例案例中，NCT得出的推荐似乎与实际接受的治疗干预有所不同。不同干预的理论可控性存在差异，其中一些干预在患者中表现出持续较高的可控性。这一概念验证方法展示了NCT原则上如何通过过程导向的干预模拟得以应用。然而，其当前应用基于理想化假设。识别出的干预是否具有临床意义需要实证检验。我们强调了NCT研究的机会，并讨论了实证改进干预效果估算的关键后续步骤。
关键词：网络控制理论；干预选择；情绪情感；生态瞬时评估；临床时间序列数据

title: Emotional Eating in Turkish Adults: Behavioral and Psychological Determinants with a Psychometric Evaluation of the Comprehensive Emotional Eating Scale.
summary: This study evaluated the psychometric properties of the Turkish version of the Comprehensive Emotional Eating Scale (CEES) and examined its associations with emotion regulation, cognitive control, cognitive flexibility, and perceived stress in adults. A cross-sectional design was conducted with 1,521 adults aged 18-74 (68% female). The CEES was adapted following standard cross-cultural guidelines, including translation, back-translation, and approval by the original scale developer. Participants also completed the Emotional Appetite Questionnaire (EMAQ), Difficulties in Emotion Regulation Scale (DERS-16), Cognitive Control and Flexibility Questionnaire (CCFQ), and Perceived Stress Scale (PSS). Confirmatory factor analysis (CFA) assessed construct validity, while internal consistency, convergent validity, and multiple linear regression analyses explored predictors of emotional eating. CFA supported a four-factor structure representing Undereating-Positive Emotions, Undereating-Negative Emotions, Overeating-Positive Emotions, and Overeating-Negative Emotions, with item loadings of 0.48-0.77; one item was removed due to low loading. Internal consistency was high (α = .88-.91), and convergent validity was confirmed via EMAQ correlations. Multiple regression analyses indicated that greater difficulties in emotion regulation, higher perceived stress, lower cognitive control and flexibility, smoking, higher Body Mass Index (BMI), and chronic disease significantly increased emotional eating. Women showed higher undereating-negative emotion and total emotional eating scores, while smoking, higher BMI, and chronic disease elevated scores on specific subscales. The Turkish CEES demonstrates robust psychometric properties and reliably captures multidimensional emotional eating in adults. Psychological and demographic factors increase emotional eating subscales and total scores, supporting the scale's use in research and clinical settings in Türkiye.

标题：土耳其成年人情绪性进食：行为与心理决定因素及综合情绪性进食量表的心理测量学评估
摘要：本研究评估了综合情绪性进食量表（CEES）土耳其语版的心理测量学特性，并考察了其与情绪调节、认知控制、认知灵活性和感知压力在成年人中的关联。采用横断面设计，纳入1521名18-74岁成年人（68%为女性）。CEES按照标准跨文化指南进行改编，包括翻译、回译及获得原量表开发者许可。参与者还完成了情绪食欲问卷（EMAQ）、情绪调节困难量表（DERS-16）、认知控制与灵活性问卷（CCFQ）和感知压力量表（PSS）。验证性因素分析（CFA）评估了结构效度，同时通过内部一致性、聚合效度和多元线性回归分析探讨了情绪性进食的预测因素。CFA支持四因子结构，代表“积极情绪下进食不足”、“消极情绪下进食不足”、“积极情绪下过度进食”和“消极情绪下过度进食”，项目载荷为0.48-0.77；由于载荷过低，移除一个项目。内部一致性较高（α=0.88-0.91），并通过与EMAQ的相关性验证了聚合效度。多元回归分析表明，情绪调节困难更大、感知压力更高、认知控制与灵活性更低、吸烟、身体质量指数（BMI）更高以及患有慢性疾病显著增加了情绪性进食。女性在“消极情绪下进食不足”和总体情绪性进食得分上更高，而吸烟、BMI更高和慢性疾病则提高了特定分量表的得分。土耳其语版CEES表现出稳健的心理测量学特性，能够可靠地捕捉成年人多维度的情绪性进食。心理和人口学因素增加了情绪性进食各分量表和总分，支持该量表在土耳其研究和临床环境中的应用。
关键词：情绪性进食；情绪调节；心理测量学评估；认知灵活性；感知压力

title: A deformable convolution and attention-driven multiscale transformer framework for robust and explainable speech emotion recognition.
summary: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) is a key contribution to Human-Computer interaction (HCI), mental health diagnosis, and affective computing. However, SER remains challenging due to challenges, including non-stationarity of speech signals and speaker variability. This research introduces a deformable convolution-enhanced hierarchical Swin Transformer network (DUST-Net) with token pruning and uncertainty-aware attention for robust SER. This integrates wavelet-based multiscale feature extraction, deformable convolutions, and adaptive token pruning to capture local and global emotional features efficiently. Signal preprocessing, Hiking Optimization Algorithm-based optimization, and DeepLIFT interpretability further improve performance and transparency. Experimental results achieved 98.75% accuracy, demonstrating robustness, generalizability, and efficiency in emotion recognition.

相关性：是
标题：一种基于可变形卷积和注意力驱动的多尺度Transformer框架，用于鲁棒且可解释的语音情感识别
摘要：语音情感识别（SER）是人机交互、心理健康诊断和情感计算的关键贡献。然而，由于语音信号的非平稳性和说话者变异性等挑战，SER仍然具有挑战性。本研究提出了一种可变形卷积增强的分层Swin Transformer网络（DUST-Net），结合令牌剪枝和不确定性感知注意力机制，用于鲁棒的语音情感识别。该方法整合了基于小波的多尺度特征提取、可变形卷积和自适应令牌剪枝，以有效捕获局部和全局情感特征。信号预处理、基于徒步优化算法的优化以及DeepLIFT可解释性进一步提升了性能和透明度。实验结果表明，该方法达到了98.75%的准确率，在情感识别中展现出鲁棒性、泛化性和高效性。
关键词：语音情感识别；可变形卷积；Swin Transformer；情感计算；人机交互

title: Acute stress impairs attentional control and emotional processing in social anxiety.
summary: Processing emotional faces poses a particular challenge for socially anxious individuals. Acute social stress may further alter attentional allocation and emotional processing, yet the temporal neural dynamics of these changes remain unclear. Using an electroencephalogram (EEG), we examined attentional bias and face processing through an attentional threat bias task and a passive face-viewing task following stress induction. Results showed that acute stress biased a sustained visuospatial attention toward the left visual field, which indicates reduced flexibility in reallocating attention across competing affective stimuli. Stress also broadly reduced event-related potential (ERP) amplitudes and attenuated frontal alpha event-related desynchronization (alpha ERD), suggesting diminished attentional resource availability and cortical control. Notably, early rapid responses to threatening faces remain intact. Together, these findings indicate that acute stress reorganizes attentional processing by depleting resources required for sustained attention and regulatory engagement, potentially exacerbating social information processing vulnerabilities in social anxiety.

标题：急性应激损害社交焦虑中的注意控制与情绪加工
摘要：情绪面孔加工对社交焦虑个体构成特殊挑战。急性社会应激可能进一步改变注意分配与情绪加工，但其时间神经动态仍不清楚。本研究采用脑电图（EEG），通过应激诱导后的注意威胁偏向任务和被动面孔观看任务，考察了注意偏向与面孔加工。结果显示，急性应激将持续性的视空间注意向左视野偏移，表明在竞争性情感刺激之间重新分配注意的灵活性降低。应激还广泛降低了事件相关电位（ERP）振幅并减弱了额叶α事件相关去同步化（alpha ERD），提示注意资源可用性和皮层控制下降。值得注意的是，对威胁面孔的早期快速反应保持完整。综上，这些发现表明急性应激通过消耗持续性注意与调控参与所需的资源来重组注意加工，可能加剧社交焦虑中社会信息加工的脆弱性。
关键词：社交焦虑；急性应激；注意控制；情绪加工；事件相关电位

title: NSUN5 Deficiency Drives Anxiety-Like Behaviors in Mice via Increased Microglial Activation and Impaired LTD Induction in the Basolateral Amygdala.
summary: Williams-Beuren Syndrome (WBS), is a neurodevelopmental disorder characterized by anxiety, hypersociality and neurocognitive abnormalities, resulting from a heterozygous microdeletion on chromosome 7q11.23. A cytosine-5 RNA methyltransferase, NSUN5, is one of the deleted genes, which has been linked to cognitive deficits in WBS patients. However, the relation of NSUN5 to anxiety disorders and underlying mechanisms remain unknown. Here, we report that NSUN5 deficiency triggers anxiety-like behaviors without hypersociality in both adult male and female mice. NSUN5 exhibits specific expression in oligodendrocyte precursor cells (OPCs) within the basolateral amygdala (BLA), which is one of the main brain regions linked to anxiety. In addition, NSUN5 deficiency in mice leads to reduced OPCs proliferation accompanied with microglial activation. Mechanistically, we revealed that the specific decline in secretion of OPCs-derived fibroblast growth factor 2 (FGF2) resulted in microglial activation and exacerbated the levels of TNFα and IL-1β cytokines in NSUN5-deficient mice. Field excitatory postsynaptic potentials (fEPSPs) slopes at external capsule BLA synapse were increased in NSUN5-deficient mice. Moreover, an increase in paired-pulse inhibition and an impairment of long-term depression (LTD) induction were observed in NSUN5-deficient mice, which could be rescued either by intra-BLA injection of recombinant mouse FGF2 (rmFGF2) or by pharmacological suppression of microglial activation with minocycline. Furthermore, the anxiety-like behaviors in NSUN5-deficient mice were also relieved by rmFGF2 or minocycline treatments. Taken together, our study unveils a previously unknown effect of NSUN5 on anxiety disorders and a role of NSUN5 in regulating OPCs-microglia interaction and synaptic plasticity of BLA.

标题：NSUN5缺乏通过增加基底外侧杏仁核中小胶质细胞激活和损害长时程抑制诱导小鼠焦虑样行为
摘要：Williams-Beuren综合征（WBS）是一种以焦虑、超社交性和神经认知异常为特征的神经发育障碍，由染色体7q11.23的杂合微缺失引起。胞嘧啶-5 RNA甲基转移酶NSUN5是缺失基因之一，已被认为与WBS患者的认知缺陷有关。然而，NSUN5与焦虑障碍的关系及其潜在机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们报告NSUN5缺乏在成年雄性和雌性小鼠中引发焦虑样行为，但不伴随超社交性。NSUN5在基底外侧杏仁核（BLA）的少突胶质前体细胞（OPCs）中特异性表达，BLA是与焦虑相关的主要脑区之一。此外，NSUN5缺乏导致小鼠OPCs增殖减少，同时伴有小胶质细胞激活。机制上，我们发现NSUN5缺乏小鼠中OPCs衍生成纤维细胞生长因子2（FGF2）分泌的特异性下降导致小胶质细胞激活，并加剧TNFα和IL-1β细胞因子水平。NSUN5缺乏小鼠外囊-BLA突触的场兴奋性突触后电位（fEPSPs）斜率增加。此外，在NSUN5缺乏小鼠中观察到配对脉冲抑制增加和长时程抑制（LTD）诱导受损，这些可通过BLA内注射重组小鼠FGF2（rmFGF2）或米诺环素药理抑制小胶质细胞激活来挽救。进一步，rmFGF2或米诺环素治疗也缓解了NSUN5缺乏小鼠的焦虑样行为。总之，我们的研究揭示了NSUN5对焦虑障碍的先前未知效应，以及NSUN5在调节OPCs-小胶质细胞相互作用和BLA突触可塑性中的作用。
关键词：焦虑样行为，小胶质细胞激活，少突胶质前体细胞，基底外侧杏仁核，长时程抑制

title: Predictive encoding of pain location in the motor system indexed by somatomotor alpha and corticospinal excitability.
summary: The pain network must not only respond to pain but also predict its occurrence to proactively guide defensive response. Yet how pain-related predictions are learned and updated in the nervous system remains unclear. Using a Pavlovian threat conditioning task, participants learned that two different visual cues predicted painful shocks either to the left or right arm, while a third cue never predicted pain. After acquisition, cue-pain contingencies were reversed to assess prediction updating. Neural and autonomic responses were recorded during pain anticipation (i.e. cue presentation) using electroencephalography, skin conductance response, and double-coil transcranial magnetic stimulation to measure corticospinal excitability both contralateral and ipsilateral to the anticipated pain location. We found that skin conductance response increased bilaterally and irrespective of the predicted pain location, reflecting a general state of threat preparedness by the autonomic system. In contrast, the suppression of somatomotor alpha power and reduction of corticospinal excitability were lateralized and functionally coupled, suggesting precise motor tuning to the predicted pain location. During reversal, an increase in frontocentral theta power emerged, supporting the updating of previously learned pain predictions. Connectivity analyses further corroborated this, revealing dynamic interactions between somatomotor and frontocentral oscillatory activity. Together, these findings advance the understanding of the neurocognitive mechanisms of nociception by showing that pain anticipation is subserved by dissociable yet interacting networks supporting general threat detection and context-sensitive defensive response.

标题：运动系统中疼痛位置的预测性编码：基于躯体运动alpha波和皮质脊髓兴奋性的指标
摘要：疼痛网络不仅必须对疼痛做出反应，还必须预测其发生，以主动引导防御反应。然而，疼痛相关预测在神经系统中如何学习和更新仍不清楚。通过一项巴甫洛夫威胁条件化任务，参与者学会两种不同的视觉线索分别预测左臂或右臂的疼痛电击，而第三种线索从不预测疼痛。习得后，线索-疼痛的关联被反转以评估预测更新。在疼痛预期期间（即线索呈现时），使用脑电图、皮肤电反应和双线圈经颅磁刺激测量皮质脊髓兴奋性（分别针对预期疼痛位置的 contralateral 和 ipsilateral 侧），记录神经和自主神经反应。我们发现，皮肤电反应呈双侧增加且不受预期疼痛位置影响，反映了自主神经系统的一般性威胁准备状态。相比之下，躯体运动alpha波的抑制和皮质脊髓兴奋性的降低呈现侧化且功能耦合，表明运动系统针对预期疼痛位置进行了精确调整。在反转阶段，前中央theta波功率增加，支持先前学习到的疼痛预测的更新。连接性分析进一步证实了这一点，揭示了躯体运动和前中央振荡活动之间的动态交互。总之，这些发现表明疼痛预期由支持一般威胁检测和情境敏感防御反应的可分离但相互作用的网络所支撑，推进了对伤害感受神经认知机制的理解。
关键词：疼痛预期；预测性编码；躯体运动alpha波；皮质脊髓兴奋性；巴甫洛夫条件化

title: Dynamic brain network reconfiguration under stress: A multiphase fMRI study.
summary: Acute stress induces a dynamic reallocation of neural resources across three distinct phases: Pre-stress, Stress, and Post-stress. Despite extensive research on isolated phases, a critical gap remains in understanding how this resource reconfiguration shapes the brain's dynamic characteristics across the entire temporal continuum. To address this gap, we employed Hidden Markov Modeling (HMM) to investigate whole-brain network dynamics continuously across all phases in two independent cohorts using the ScanSTRESS (n = 77, 35 females) and Montreal Imaging Stress Task (n = 48, 24 females). Our results revealed rapid and reversible spatiotemporal reconfigurations of large-scale brain networks, accompanied by elevated cortisol levels in both cohorts. Specifically, a marked spatiotemporal reconfiguration of brain networks was observed from Pre-stress to Stress phases, characterized by overall suppressed activation of the executive control network, alongside enhanced sensory processing, and increased functional coupling among salience, sensory, and executive networks. These changes reversed during the Post-stress phase, with no significant differences between Pre- and Post-stress phases. Critically, we identified robust individual differences: females exhibited higher state switching rates during stress across both cohorts, and a poorer post-stress recovery index (greater deviation from baseline) was associated with higher depression and anxiety scores. Synthesizing these findings, we propose a Tri-Phase Network Reconfiguration Model positing that allostasis is achieved through phase-specific brain state repertoires and directed transitions. This dynamic framework advances our understanding of stress adaptation and offers testable hypotheses for how these processes may be dysregulated in stress-related psychopathology.

标题：压力下的动态脑网络重构：一项多阶段功能磁共振成像研究
摘要：急性压力诱导神经资源在三个不同阶段（压力前、压力中、压力后）的动态重新分配。尽管对孤立阶段已有广泛研究，但在理解这种资源重构如何塑造大脑在整个时间连续体上的动态特征方面仍存在关键空白。为填补这一空白，我们采用隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）在两种独立队列中（使用ScanSTRESS任务，n=77，35名女性；以及蒙特利尔成像压力任务，n=48，24名女性）跨所有阶段连续研究全脑网络动态。结果揭示了大规模脑网络的快速且可逆的时空重构，并伴随两个队列中皮质醇水平的升高。具体而言，从压力前到压力阶段观察到显著的脑网络时空重构，其特征为执行控制网络的整体激活抑制，同时感觉处理增强，以及突显网络、感觉网络和执行网络之间的功能耦合增加。这些变化在压力后阶段发生逆转，且压力前与压力后阶段之间无显著差异。关键的是，我们发现了稳健的个体差异：在两个队列中，女性在压力期间表现出更高的状态转换率，而较差的压力后恢复指数（与基线的更大偏差）与更高的抑郁和焦虑评分相关。综合这些发现，我们提出了一个三阶段网络重构模型，认为稳态是通过阶段特异性脑状态库和定向转换实现的。这一动态框架推进了我们对压力适应的理解，并为这些过程在压力相关精神病理学中可能失调提供了可检验的假设。
关键词：动态脑网络重构；压力；隐马尔可夫模型；情绪；皮质醇

title: Context-dependent variation in meerkat short note calls reflects emotional arousal.
summary: Many animals produce the same call type in distinct contexts, yet acoustic variation can encode additional information, such as the producers' emotional state. By doing so, animals increase their capacity to communicate within potentially limited vocal repertoires. Meerkats, Suricata suricatta, produce various types of short note calls during distinct behavioural contexts; sunning, i.e. basking in the sun, and sentinel, i.e. cooperative vigilance. These two contexts likely vary in underlying emotional arousal. We first investigated if heart rate differed between sunning and sentinel contexts, indicating potential variation in arousal states. Second, we tested if calls produced during sunning and sentinel vary in production rate, call type and acoustic structure. We implanted wild meerkats with heart rate loggers and recorded their behaviour and vocalisations. We found that sentinel behaviour was associated with higher heart rates and call rates, indicating increased affective arousal. The acoustic structure of calls produced during sentinel were consistent with predictions of increased arousal, compared to calls produced during sunning, showing increased jitter, shorter duration, and more abrupt in onset. Overall, our results suggest higher emotional arousal during sentinel behaviour than sunning, reflected in cardiac activity, call rate and acoustic variation. Our results highlight that even within short, seemingly simple vocalisations, acoustic variation can enhance the amount of information transferred.

标题：猫鼬短叫声的情境依赖性变化反映情绪唤醒
摘要：许多动物在不同情境下发出相同的叫声类型，但声音变异可以编码额外信息，例如发出者的情绪状态。通过这种方式，动物在潜在有限的发声 repertoire 内增强了沟通能力。猫鼬（Suricata suricatta）在不同行为情境下发出多种类型的短叫声：晒太阳（即沐浴阳光）和哨兵（即合作警戒）。这两种情境可能在潜在的情绪唤醒程度上有所不同。我们首先研究了晒太阳和哨兵情境下心率是否存在差异，以指示唤醒状态的潜在变化。其次，我们测试了在晒太阳和哨兵期间发出的叫声在发出率、叫声类型和声学结构上是否存在变异。我们对野生猫鼬植入了心率记录器，并记录了它们的行为和发声。我们发现，哨兵行为与更高的心率和叫声率相关，表明情绪唤醒增强。与晒太阳期间发出的叫声相比，哨兵期间发出的叫声的声学结构与唤醒增强的预测一致，表现为抖动增加、时长缩短和起始更突然。总体而言，我们的结果表明，哨兵行为期间的情绪唤醒高于晒太阳，这一点反映在心脏活动、叫声率和声学变异上。我们的结果强调，即使在简短、看似简单的发声内，声学变异也能增强传递的信息量。
关键词：情绪唤醒；叫声变异；猫鼬；心率；声学结构

title: How pattern of parental care and child emotional support predicts trajectories of depressive symptoms among Chinese middle-age and older adults.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Late-life depression shows heterogeneous developmental trajectories. Prior studies in older Chinese populations have identified distinct depressive trajectories, yet the influence of family emotional support across the life course remains underexplored. We conceptualized intergenerational emotional interaction patterns as the combined configuration of early-life parental affection and later-life emotional support from adult children. This study identified late-life depressive trajectories and tested whether these patterns predict depressive trajectory among Chinese older adults.
METHODS: Using China Health and Retirement Longitudinal Study (CHARLS) data (2011-2020; n = 9888), this study identified depressive trajectories using Latent Class Growth Modeling (LCGM) and Latent Profile Analysis (LPA) was used to categorize participants into subgroups based on maternal/paternal affection and emotional support from adult children. Multinomial logistic regression and Chi-square tests assessed associations between profiles and trajectories.
RESULTS: Four depressive trajectories emerged: "no depression" (56.3%), "deterioration" (22.4%), "alleviation" (12.3%), and "chronic depression" (9.1%). Three distinct intergenerational emotional interaction patterns were found: "emotional inheritance" (40.7%), "emotional compensatory" (17.4%), and "emotional mismatch" (41.9%). The "emotion inheritance" group was overrepresented in the "no depression" trajectory, whereas the "emotional compensatory" group faced elevated risks for being classified into "deterioration" and "chronic depression" trajectories.
CONCLUSION: Intergenerational emotional interaction patterns are independently and jointly associated with depressive symptoms trajectories in later life. The strongest protective effects were observed for individuals with both high childhood parental affection and ongoing emotional support from children. Conversely, low parental affection-even when compensated by later-life support-was linked to worse mental health outcomes.

标题：父母养育模式与子女情感支持如何预测中国中老年人抑郁症状轨迹
摘要：背景：老年抑郁症表现出异质性的发展轨迹。以往针对中国老年人群的研究已识别出不同的抑郁轨迹，但生命历程中家庭情感支持的影响仍未得到充分探索。本研究将代际情感互动模式概念化为早期父母情感与后期成年子女情感支持的组合配置，旨在识别老年抑郁轨迹，并检验这些模式是否能够预测中国老年人的抑郁轨迹变化。
方法：利用中国健康与养老追踪调查（CHARLS）2011-2020年数据（n=9888），本研究通过潜在类别增长建模（LCGM）识别抑郁轨迹，并采用潜在剖面分析（LPA）根据母亲/父亲情感及成年子女情感支持将参与者分为亚组。采用多项逻辑回归和卡方检验评估各剖面与轨迹之间的关联。
结果：共发现四种抑郁轨迹：“无抑郁”（56.3%）、“恶化”（22.4%）、“缓解”（12.3%）和“慢性抑郁”（9.1%）。识别出三种不同的代际情感互动模式：“情感继承”（40.7%）、“情感补偿”（17.4%）和“情感错配”（41.9%）。“情感继承”组在“无抑郁”轨迹中占比过高，而“情感补偿”组被归类为“恶化”和“慢性抑郁”轨迹的风险更高。
结论：代际情感互动模式与晚年抑郁症状轨迹独立且联合相关。童年期高父母情感与持续子女情感支持的个体展现出最强的保护效应。相反，低父母情感即使得到后期子女情感补偿，仍与较差的心理健康结果相关。
关键词：抑郁症状轨迹；代际情感互动；父母养育；情感支持；中国老年人

title: When empathy feels scarce: How zero-sum beliefs fuel depression in close relationships.
summary: This study examined how zero-sum beliefs-perceiving emotional resources as limited-shape individuals' emotional experiences in daily romantic interactions. Using experience sampling methodology and a dyadic design, we collected data from 198 heterosexual romantic dyads (N = 396 individuals), yielding 5280 valid daily observations over 14 days. We investigated how individuals' zero-sum beliefs influence both their own and their partner's daily depressive mood through two pathways: reduced empathic engagement and heightened sensitivity to perceived empathic imbalance. Results showed that individuals who endorsed stronger zero-sum beliefs tended to offer less empathy to their partners and were more prone to experience empathic trade-offs, both of which predicted elevated depression. Notably, men's zero-sum beliefs were unexpectedly associated with lower depressive mood in their female partners, suggesting a potential adaptive disengagement mechanism. These findings extend the theoretical scope of zero-sum belief research into close relationships and underscore the role of interpersonal belief systems in shaping emotional health. Understanding how individuals cognitively frame empathy may offer critical insights into the development of targeted interventions to mitigate emotional strain and promote relational well-being.

标题：当共情感到稀缺：零和信念如何在亲密关系中催生抑郁
摘要：本研究考察了零和信念——将情绪资源视为有限——如何塑造个体在日常浪漫互动中的情绪体验。采用经验取样方法和双人设计，我们从198对异性浪漫伴侣（N=396人）中收集数据，在14天内获得5280个有效的日常观察。我们探讨了个体的零和信念如何通过两条路径影响自身及伴侣的日常抑郁情绪：共情投入减少和对感知到的共情失衡敏感性增强。结果表明，持有更强零和信念的个体往往对伴侣提供更少的共情，并且更容易体验到共情权衡，这两者均预测了抑郁水平的升高。值得注意的是，男性的零和信念意外地与女性伴侣较低的抑郁情绪相关，提示可能存在一种适应性脱离机制。这些发现将零和信念研究的理论范围扩展至亲密关系，并强调了人际信念系统在塑造情绪健康中的作用。理解个体如何从认知上构建共情，可能为开发针对性干预措施以缓解情绪压力和促进关系福祉提供关键洞见。
关键词：零和信念；共情；抑郁；亲密关系；经验取样

title: PTSD symptoms moderate the effects of interpretation bias modification on hostile interpretation bias and trait anger.
summary: Individuals with heightened anger tend to interpret ambiguous situations as hostile, maintaining their anger. Importantly, both hostile interpretation bias and anger have been linked to detrimental outcomes such as substance use disorders and suicide. Hostile interpretation bias modification (IBMH) has been found to efficaciously reduce hostile attribution bias, but findings have been mixed on its ability to reduce anger. One factor that may contextualize these findings are symptoms of posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD), which have been found to be associated with both hostile interpretation bias and anger. PTSD symptoms were examined as a potential moderator of the effect of IBM-H in sample of trauma-exposed smokers elevated in anger (N = 76). IBM-H was compared to a health and relaxation video control. Among participants elevated (i.e., +1SD) in baseline PTSD symptoms, IBM-H saw significantly lower trait anger following treatment compared to control, though there was no effect of condition on anger in individuals low in PTSD symptoms. Further, among individuals high in PTSD symptoms, changes in hostile interpretation bias fully mediated the effect of IBM-H on anger. These findings provide preliminary support that IBM-H for anger may be most efficacious for those elevated in PTSD symptoms. However, the generalizability of these findings are limited given the sample consisted of trauma-exposed smokers who wished to quit smoking. Future research should examine the efficacy of IBM-H for anger in individuals with PTSD (both smoker and non-smokers) and for secondary outcomes such as substance use disorders, depression, and PTSD symptoms.

相关性：是  
标题：PTSD症状调节解释偏差修正对敌意解释偏差和特质愤怒的影响  
摘要：愤怒水平较高的个体倾向于将模糊情境解释为具有敌意，从而维持其愤怒情绪。重要的是，敌意解释偏差和愤怒均与物质使用障碍和自杀等不良后果相关。研究发现，敌意解释偏差修正（IBM-H）能有效减少敌意归因偏差，但其对愤怒情绪的缓解效果尚不一致。可能影响这些结果的因素之一是创伤后应激障碍（PTSD）症状，该症状已被发现与敌意解释偏差和愤怒相关。本研究以76名愤怒情绪较高的创伤暴露吸烟者为样本，检验了PTSD症状对IBM-H效果的潜在调节作用。将IBM-H与健康放松视频对照组进行比较。结果显示，在基线PTSD症状较高（+1标准差）的参与者中，接受IBM-H后其特质愤怒显著低于对照组，而在PTSD症状较低的个体中，条件对愤怒无显著影响。此外，在PTSD症状较高的个体中，敌意解释偏差的变化完全中介了IBM-H对愤怒的影响。这些发现初步支持了针对愤怒的IBM-H可能对PTSD症状较高的个体最有效。然而，鉴于样本为希望戒烟的创伤暴露吸烟者，结果的可推广性有限。未来研究应检验IBM-H对PTSD患者（包括吸烟者和非吸烟者）愤怒情绪的效果，并考察其对物质使用障碍、抑郁和PTSD症状等次要结局的影响。  
关键词：敌意解释偏差；特质愤怒；PTSD症状；解释偏差修正；创伤暴露

title: Sex-dependent disruption of affective behaviors by GBR 12909: relevance to bipolar disorders.
summary: Bipolar disorders (BD) are defined by a chronic recurrence of manic and depressive phases. Along with mood, acute phases are associated with altered emotions. The biological underpinnings of these changes are unresolved, mostly because modeling the cycling nature of BD is still a major challenge in preclinical studies. One pharmacological model is based on GBR 12909 administration, a dopamine transporter inhibitor aiming at mimicking some dimensions of mania. Recent findings indicate that this model generates a mixed phenotype, combining hyperlocomotion with negative hedonic biases and anxiety. These studies have only been performed in male animals, and other behavioral dimensions relevant for BD remain to be explored, in particular recognition of conspecific emotional states and reactivity to danger. The objective of this study is to further characterize the GBR model in mice of both sexes by introducing two novel behavioral assays, the sweeping/looming disk and the negative emotion recognition tasks to evaluate response to threat and emotion discrimination. First, we replicated the previous results in the GBR model: higher anxiety, hyperlocomotion, anhedonia in males. These phenotypes were less pronounced and did not reach significance in females. GBR also induced a hypersensitivity to threat in both sexes in the sweeping/looming disk. GBR abolished preference for the emotional target only in males, suggesting altered emotion recognition. This work introduces new phenotypic dimensions relevant to study BD and highlights the necessity to study both sexes which are not strictly equivalent in their behavioral responses.

标题：GBR 12909对情感行为的性别依赖性破坏：与双相障碍的相关性
摘要：双相障碍的特征在于躁狂和抑郁阶段的慢性复发。除了情绪波动，急性阶段还伴随着情感的改变。这些变化的生物学基础尚未明确，主要原因是预临床研究中模拟双相障碍的循环性质仍是一大挑战。一种基于GBR 12909给药（一种多巴胺转运体抑制剂）的药理学模型旨在模拟躁狂的某些维度。近期发现表明，该模型产生了一种混合表型，即高活动性与负性快感缺失偏差和焦虑并存。这些研究仅在雄性动物中进行，而与双相障碍相关的其他行为维度，特别是对同类情感状态的识别和对危险的反应性，仍有待探索。本研究的目的是通过引入两种新的行为测试——扫视/逼近圆盘任务和负性情绪识别任务，来评估对威胁的反应和情绪辨别能力，从而进一步在两种性别的小鼠中表征GBR模型。首先，我们复制了GBR模型在雄性中的先前结果：更高的焦虑、高活动性和快感缺失。这些表型在雌性中较不明显且未达到显著性。GBR在两种性别中均诱导了扫视/逼近圆盘任务中对威胁的超敏反应。GBR仅在雄性中消除了对情绪目标的偏好，提示情绪识别受损。这项工作引入了与双相障碍研究相关的新表型维度，并强调了研究两种性别的必要性，因为它们在行为反应上并非严格等同。
关键词：双相障碍；情感行为；GBR 12909；性别差异；情绪识别

title: Attentional biases in women with postpartum depressive symptoms: A comparative eye-tracking study.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Postpartum depression (PPD) has been linked to alterations in emotional processing, yet attentional biases toward infant emotional expressions remain poorly understood and findings are inconsistent. This study examined whether mothers with PPD symptoms differ from mothers without symptoms and non-depressed non-mothers in visual attention to emotional infant and adult faces.
METHODS: 26 mothers with PPD symptoms, 30 mothers without symptoms, and 21 non-depressed non-mothers. Participants completed a free-viewing eye-tracking task presenting emotional (happy, angry, sad) and neutral faces of infants and adults. Measures of initial orientation and attentional maintenance were analyzed using linear mixed models.
RESULTS: Mothers with PPD oriented faster to happy infant faces than both control groups, but this early bias was not accompanied by greater sustained attention. Greater PPD symptom severity was marginally associated with slower orientation to infant sadness. At later stages, mothers with PPD showed reduced avoidance of infant sadness and increased sustained attention to angry infant expressions. Higher PPD scores were associated with greater maintenance of attention to negative expressions across infant and adult faces. For adult stimuli, mothers with PPD showed increased sustained attention to negative and reduced processing of positive expressions, whereas mothers without PPD and non-mothers preferentially attended to happy faces.
CONCLUSIONS: PPD is associated with a dynamic, context-dependent pattern of attention rather than a uniform bias. While attentional processing of adult faces fits cognitive models of depression, responses to infant faces reflect a more complex pattern combining an early orientation toward positive stimuli but subsequent capture by negative cues.

相关性：是
标题：产后抑郁症状女性的注意偏向：一项眼动追踪比较研究
摘要：背景：产后抑郁（PPD）与情绪加工改变有关，然而对婴儿情绪表达的注意偏向仍不明确且研究结果不一致。本研究考察了有PPD症状的母亲与无PPD症状的母亲及非抑郁的非母亲群体，在视觉注意婴儿和成人情绪面孔方面的差异。
方法：26名有PPD症状的母亲、30名无PPD症状的母亲和21名非抑郁的非母亲。参与者完成了一项自由观看眼动追踪任务，呈现婴儿和成人的情绪面孔（快乐、愤怒、悲伤）及中性面孔。采用线性混合模型分析初始定向和注意维持的测量指标。
结果：有PPD症状的母亲对婴儿快乐面孔的定向速度显著快于两个对照组，但这种早期偏向并未伴随更强的持续注意。PPD症状严重程度与对婴儿悲伤面孔的定向变慢呈边缘显著相关。在后期阶段，有PPD症状的母亲对婴儿悲伤面孔的回避减少，对婴儿愤怒表情的持续注意增加。更高的PPD得分与对婴儿和成人面孔中消极表情的更大注意维持相关。对于成人刺激，有PPD症状的母亲对消极表情的持续注意增加，而对积极表情的加工减少，而无PPD症状的母亲和非母亲则优先注意快乐面孔。
结论：PPD与一种动态、依赖于情境的注意模式相关，而非统一的偏向。虽然对成人面孔的注意加工符合抑郁的认知模型，但对婴儿面孔的反应反映出更复杂的模式，即早期偏向积极刺激，但随后被消极线索所捕获。
关键词：产后抑郁；注意偏向；情绪面孔；婴儿表情；眼动追踪

title: An exploratory randomized controlled trial of an AI-enabled mental health intervention for generalized anxiety.
summary: Generalized Anxiety Disorder (GAD) is prevalent and often co-occurs with depression, contributing to significant disability and healthcare burden. Although treatments such as CBT and SSRIs are effective, access remains limited. This exploratory, randomized controlled trial evaluated the effectiveness of an AI-powered mental health app (PATH) in reducing symptoms of anxiety and depression. A total of 316 UK-based participants (aged 19-70) were randomized to either the intervention group (PATH) or a control group (NHS self-help website). The intervention provided evidence-based strategies including CBT-informed chat therapy and interactive tools. Anxiety (GAD-7) and depression (PHQ-9) scores were measured at baseline, two, eight, and twelve weeks. Of the 316 randomized participants, 235 completed the post-intervention assessment (33.0% attrition in the intervention group vs. 18.5% in the control group). Retention at 8-week and 12-week follow-ups was 77.4% and 54.0%, respectively. At two weeks, the intervention group showed significantly lower GAD-7 and PHQ-9 scores compared to control, with medium effect sizes. At eight weeks, those who continued using the app showed significant reductions in both anxiety and depression, while those who discontinued still showed medium improvements in anxiety. Effects were maintained at twelve weeks, with moderate to large effect sizes. Findings suggest that PATH significantly reduces anxiety and depressive symptoms, particularly with continued use. These results support the app's potential as a scalable, accessible digital intervention to address mental health treatment gaps.

标题：一项针对广泛性焦虑的AI心理健康干预的探索性随机对照试验

摘要：广泛性焦虑障碍（GAD）普遍存在，且常与抑郁症共病，导致显著的功能障碍和医疗负担。尽管CBT和SSRIs等治疗手段有效，但获取途径仍然有限。这项探索性随机对照试验评估了AI驱动的心理健康应用程序（PATH）在减轻焦虑和抑郁症状方面的效果。共316名英国参与者（年龄19-70岁）被随机分为干预组（PATH）或对照组（NHS自助网站）。干预措施提供基于证据的策略，包括CBT指导的聊天治疗和互动工具。在基线、第2周、第8周和第12周测量焦虑（GAD-7）和抑郁（PHQ-9）评分。在316名随机参与者中，235人完成了干预后评估（干预组退出率为33.0%，对照组为18.5%）。在第8周和第12周随访时，保留率分别为77.4%和54.0%。在第2周，干预组的GAD-7和PHQ-9评分显著低于对照组，效应量为中等。在第8周，继续使用该应用程序的参与者在焦虑和抑郁方面均表现出显著改善，而停止使用的参与者在焦虑方面仍显示出中等改善。在第12周时，效果得以维持，效应量为中到大。研究结果表明，PATH能显著减轻焦虑和抑郁症状，尤其是在持续使用时。这些结果支持该应用程序作为一种可扩展、易获取的数字干预措施，以解决心理健康治疗缺口。

关键词：广泛性焦虑；人工智能；心理健康干预；随机对照试验；认知行为疗法

title: Effects of aerobic exercise on depression-like behaviors and hippocampal transcriptomics in CSDS-induced adolescent mice.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Adolescence is a critical period of vulnerability to depression, yet most evidence for the antidepressant effects of exercise derives from adult models. This study aims to investigate the effects of aerobic exercise and identify its associated molecular changes in the adolescent depression mouse model.
METHODS: A chronic social defeat stress (CSDS) model was established in adolescent male C57BL/6J mice to induce depression-like behaviors. Thirty-six mice were randomly assigned to three groups: control (CG), model (MG), and model plus exercise (ME). MG and ME mice were subjected to CSDS for two weeks (days 7-20), while ME mice additionally received three weeks of aerobic treadmill training covering the whole CSDS period (days 0-20). Behavioral tests were conducted on days 21-26, followed by the collection of serum and hippocampal tissues for molecular, histological, and transcriptomic analyses.
RESULTS: CSDS induced significant depression-like behaviors in adolescent male mice, including social avoidance, anhedonia, and behavioral despair, all of which were effectively alleviated by aerobic exercise. Aerobic exercise appeared to mitigate CSDS-induced neural damage and maintain hippocampal tissue integrity. Moreover, aerobic exercise increased serum levels of serotonin. Transcriptomic analysis identified 587 differentially expressed genes (DEGs). Among these genes, 59 overlapping DEGs were regulated by both CSDS and exercise, and were enriched in carbohydrate metabolism and cholinergic signaling pathways.
CONCLUSIONS: Aerobic exercise alleviates depression-like behaviors in adolescent male mice, possibly by modulating hippocampal gene expression - especially in cholinergic and carbohydrate metabolism pathways - which provides potential clues to how exercise could influence peripheral monoamine levels and hippocampal structural integrity. These putative mechanisms require further investigation.

标题：有氧运动对CSDS诱导的青春期小鼠抑郁样行为及海马转录组学的影响
摘要：背景：青春期是抑郁易感的关键时期，然而运动抗抑郁效果的大部分证据来自成年模型。本研究旨在探讨有氧运动在青春期抑郁小鼠模型中的作用，并识别其相关的分子变化。方法：在青春期雄性C57BL/6J小鼠中建立慢性社交挫败应激（CSDS）模型，以诱导抑郁样行为。将36只小鼠随机分为三组：对照组（CG）、模型组（MG）和模型加运动组（ME）。MG和ME组小鼠接受为期两周（第7-20天）的CSDS处理，而ME组小鼠在整个CSDS期间（第0-20天）额外接受为期三周的有氧跑台训练。在第21-26天进行行为测试，随后收集血清和海马组织，用于分子、组织学和转录组学分析。结果：CSDS在青春期雄性小鼠中诱导了显著的抑郁样行为，包括社交回避、快感缺失和行为绝望，这些行为均被有氧运动有效缓解。有氧运动似乎减轻了CSDS诱导的神经损伤并维持了海马组织的完整性。此外，有氧运动提高了血清中血清素的水平。转录组学分析鉴定出587个差异表达基因（DEGs）。在这些基因中，有59个重叠DEGs同时受CSDS和运动调控，并富集于碳水化合物代谢和胆碱能信号通路。结论：有氧运动缓解了青春期雄性小鼠的抑郁样行为，可能通过调节海马基因表达——尤其是胆碱能和碳水化合物代谢通路——这为运动如何影响外周单胺水平及海马结构完整性提供了潜在线索。这些推测机制需要进一步研究。
关键词：有氧运动；青春期抑郁；慢性社交挫败应激；海马转录组学；胆碱能信号通路

title: Prediction models for longitudinal trajectories of depression and anxiety: a systematic review.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Prediction of atypical health trajectories may enable early intervention. We systematically reviewed the existing literature on models for predicting longitudinal depression and/or anxiety trajectories.
METHODS: MEDLINE, Embase and APA PsycINFO were searched (from inception to 31-Jan-2025). We included population-based studies of children and adults (aged 3-65 years). Risk of bias was assessed using the Prediction model Risk Of Bias ASsessment Tool (PROBAST-AI) tool.
RESULTS: Seven of the nine included studies were in adult populations with a diagnosis of depression or anxiety at baseline; two focused on child and adolescent populations. Only one study included anxiety trajectories. Identified trajectories typically comprised three to four groups including: chronic/persistent-high, stable-low, increasing/worsening, and improved/remitted groups. Various supervised predictive modelling methods were used. The number of final predictors included in models ranged from three to 152. Family and own/personal psychiatric history were the most common predictors but were not always important for model performance. Models including more predictors did not always perform better. Overall risk of bias was high in all studies. No studies were externally validated and no studies assessed the clinical utility of models.
CONCLUSION: This review highlights a need for robust, validated models that can forecast future risk of persistent or worsening anxiety and depression, especially in young people where early intervention is possible.

标题：抑郁与焦虑纵向轨迹的预测模型：一项系统综述  
摘要：背景：预测非典型健康轨迹可能有助于早期干预。我们系统综述了现有关于预测纵向抑郁和/或焦虑轨迹模型的文献。方法：检索了MEDLINE、Embase和APA PsycINFO（从建库至2025年1月31日）。纳入基于人群的儿童和成人（3-65岁）研究。使用预测模型偏倚风险评估工具（PROBAST-AI）评估偏倚风险。结果：九项纳入研究中，七项以基线时诊断为抑郁或焦虑的成人群体为研究对象；两项聚焦于儿童和青少年群体。仅有一项研究涉及焦虑轨迹。识别出的轨迹通常包括三至四类：慢性/持续-高组、稳定-低组、加重/恶化组和改善/缓解组。研究采用了多种有监督预测建模方法。模型中纳入的最终预测因子数量从3个到152个不等。家族史和自身/个人精神病史是最常见的预测因子，但对模型性能并非总是重要。包含更多预测因子的模型并非总是表现更好。所有研究的总体偏倚风险均较高。无研究进行外部验证，也无研究评估模型的临床效用。结论：本综述强调需要稳健、经过验证的模型来预测持续或恶化型焦虑和抑郁的未来风险，尤其是在可进行早期干预的年轻人群中。  
关键词：抑郁轨迹；焦虑轨迹；预测模型；系统综述；早期干预

title: Right orbitofrontal cortex rTMS targets anxiety, not depressive, symptoms in first-episode schizophrenia.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Anxiety is highly prevalent and undertreated in first-episode schizophrenia(FES), but repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation(rTMS) data for this comorbidity are scarce. The orbitofrontal cortex(OFC) is a key anxiety-regulating node, supporting its potential as a target. This study aimed to explore 1-Hz right OFC-rTMS's symptom-specific effects on FES mood.
METHODS: This is a secondary analysis of a randomized controlled trial. Participants were drug-naive FES patients randomized to the active rTMS group(n = 51) or sham group(n = 45). All completed 20 intervention sessions, 20 sessions of active OFC-rTMS or sham, with 4-week follow-up, initiating oral olanzapine(10-20 mg/day) concurrently with the first rTMS session. Mood symptoms were assessed using the 24-item Hamilton Depression Rating Scale(HAMD) and the 14-item Hamilton Anxiety Rating Scale(HAMA). Psychopathological symptoms were assessed using the Positive and Negative Syndrome Scale(PANSS). The main outcome was the changes in HAMD and HAMA scores from baseline to 2 weeks and 4 weeks.
RESULTS: The active group showed greater PANSS total(t = -3.260, p = 0.002; Cohen's d = 0.672) and subscale improvements vs. the sham group. Repeated-measures ANOVA(controlling for covariates) revealed significant Time×Group interactions for HAMA total(F = 4.698, p = 0.010; partial η2 = 0.059) and psychic anxiety(F = 5.735, p = 0.004; partial η2 = 0.072), but not somatic anxiety. For HAMD, only anxiety/somatization(F = 8.397, p = 0.031; partial η2 = 0.099) and cognitive impairment(F = 6.240, p = 0.002; partial η2 = 0.076) showed interactions, with no specific effects on overall depressive symptoms. In the sham group, HAMD anxiety/somatization correlated with all PANSS subscales(r = 0.311-0.477, p < 0.05), but this correlation was absent in the active group(all p > 0.05).
CONCLUSIONS: Right OFC-rTMS improves FES anxiety (not depression), supporting it as a targeted non-pharmacological option.

标题：右侧眶额皮质重复经颅磁刺激靶向治疗首发精神分裂症的焦虑症状（而非抑郁症状）
摘要：背景：焦虑在首发精神分裂症（FES）中高度普遍但治疗不足，而关于此共病的重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）数据稀少。眶额皮质（OFC）是一个关键的焦虑调节节点，支持其作为治疗靶点的潜力。本研究旨在探索1-Hz右侧眶额皮质重复经颅磁刺激（右OFC-rTMS）对FES心境症状的特异性效应。方法：这是一项随机对照试验的二次分析。参与者为未用药的FES患者，随机分配至主动rTMS组（n=51）或假刺激组（n=45）。所有患者完成20次干预疗程（20次主动OFC-rTMS或假刺激），并进行4周随访，同时从首次rTMS疗程开始口服奥氮平（10-20毫克/天）。使用24项汉密尔顿抑郁评定量表（HAMD）和14项汉密尔顿焦虑评定量表（HAMA）评估心境症状。使用阳性与阴性症状量表（PANSS）评估精神病理症状。主要结局指标为基线与2周及4周时HAMD和HAMA评分的变化。结果：与假刺激组相比，主动组在PANSS总分（t=-3.260，p=0.002；Cohen's d=0.672）及其子量表上显示出更大改善。重复测量方差分析（控制协变量）显示，HAMA总分（F=4.698，p=0.010；偏η²=0.059）和精神性焦虑（F=5.735，p=0.004；偏η²=0.072）存在显著的时间×组别交互作用，但躯体焦虑无此效应。对于HAMD，仅焦虑/躯体化（F=8.397，p=0.031；偏η²=0.099）和认知障碍（F=6.240，p=0.002；偏η²=0.076）显示出交互作用，对整体抑郁症状无特异性效应。在假刺激组中，HAMD焦虑/躯体化与所有PANSS子量表相关（r=0.311-0.477，p<0.05），但此相关性在主动组中消失（所有p>0.05）。结论：右侧眶额皮质重复经颅磁刺激能改善FES的焦虑症状（而非抑郁症状），支持其作为一种靶向非药物选择。
关键词：重复经颅磁刺激；焦虑；首发精神分裂症；眶额皮质；情绪调节

title: Associations between early-life unpredictability and mental health during the Israel-Hamas war.
summary: Exposure to war increases the risk for emotional and psychological distress, especially among people with pre-existing vulnerabilities. According to life history models of development and psychopathology, unpredictability experienced in the first years of life should forecast greater vulnerability to emotion dysregulation and psychological symptoms in adulthood. Moreover, the sensitization hypothesis posits that such effects should be particularly manifested in currently stressful environments. The present research investigated trajectories of emotion dysregulation and psychological distress experienced by adult Israeli Jews before and during the Israel-Hamas war that started on October 7, 2023, as well as the moderating role of early-life unpredictability. The participants (N = 720) were assessed twice before the war and twice during the first six months of the war. In each assessment, they completed measures of emotion dysregulation (DERS-18) and general psychological distress (SCL-10R). Retrospective reports of early-life unpredictability were collected at T1 regarding the first 10 years of life. Multilevel models indicated that psychological distress and emotion dysregulation increased co-dependently after the war started. Early-life unpredictability was associated with greater psychological distress and emotion dysregulation before the war and a larger increase in psychological distress after the war started. Moreover, early-life unpredictability was associated with a greater increase in psychological distress among war-exposed individuals. These findings indicate that the Israel-Hamas war exerted an emotional and psychological toll on Israeli adults. They further suggest that early-life unpredictability is a general risk factor for emotion dysregulation and psychological distress in adulthood and predicts worse mental health in war-exposed individuals.

标题：早期生活不可预测性与以色列-哈马斯战争期间心理健康的关系
摘要：战争暴露增加了情绪和心理困扰的风险，尤其是对于已有脆弱性的人群。根据发展和精神病理学的生命史模型，生命早期经历的不预测性应预示着成年后情绪失调和心理症状的更大脆弱性。此外，敏化假说认为，这种效应在当前压力环境中应尤为明显。本研究调查了以色列-哈马斯战争（始于2023年10月7日）前后，成年以色列犹太人的情绪失调和心理困扰轨迹，以及早期生活不可预测性的调节作用。参与者（N=720）在战前评估两次，并在战争前六个月内评估两次。每次评估中，他们完成了情绪失调（DERS-18）和一般心理困扰（SCL-10R）的测量。在第一次评估时收集了关于生命前10年早期生活不可预测性的回顾性报告。多层次模型表明，战争开始后，心理困扰和情绪失调共同上升。早期生活不可预测性与战前更高的心理困扰和情绪失调相关，并与战后心理困扰更大程度的增加相关。此外，在战争暴露个体中，早期生活不可预测性与心理困扰更大程度的增加相关。这些发现表明，以色列-哈马斯战争对以色列成年人造成了情绪和心理负担。它们进一步表明，早期生活不可预测性是成年期情绪失调和心理困扰的一般风险因素，并预示着战争暴露个体更差的心理健康状况。
关键词：早期生活不可预测性；情绪失调；心理困扰；战争暴露；心理健康

title: The relationship between childhood trauma, inhibitory dysfunction, and emotion processing: Exploring differences across social anhedonia levels.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Childhood trauma (CT) has widespread adverse effects on individual's cognitive and emotional problems; however, little is known about the underlying psychological mechanisms. This study aimed to examine the relationship between CT, inhibitory dysfunction, and emotion processing, as well as to explore potential differences in these associations across groups with different levels of social anhedonia.
METHODS: We administered a set of self-reported measures to capture CT, pleasure experiences, emotion regulation as well as executive dysfunction to 1622 healthy participants. Partial correlation network and nodal centrality were estimated. The mediation effect of inhibitory dysfunction on the relationships between CT and emotion processing was examined. Furthermore, participants were divided into three groups (i.e., high, middle and low) according to their social anhedonia (SoA) levels, network comparison tests and mediation effect analysis in each group were performed.
RESULTS: Network analysis showed that CT was negatively associated with cognitive reappraisal (CR) and pleasure experiences, and positively associated with expressive suppression. Inhibitory dysfunction significantly mediated the relationship between CT and emotion regulation. Subgroup analysis showed that significant mediation effect of inhibitory dysfunction on the association between CT and CR was only found in low SoA group, but not in middle and high SoA groups.
CONCLUSIONS: Our study suggested that inhibitory dysfunction plays an important role between CT and emotion regulation, which is disrupted in individuals with middle to high levels of social anhedonia. These findings highlight the necessity of considering inhibitory function when developing interventions for trauma-related emotional problems.

标题：童年创伤、抑制功能障碍与情绪加工的关系：探索不同社会快感缺失水平下的差异
摘要：背景：童年创伤对个体的认知和情绪问题具有广泛的不良影响，然而其潜在心理机制尚不明确。本研究旨在考察童年创伤、抑制功能障碍与情绪加工之间的关系，并探索这些关联在不同社会快感缺失水平群体中的潜在差异。方法：我们采用一套自我报告测量工具，对1622名健康参与者收集了有关童年创伤、愉悦体验、情绪调节及执行功能障碍的数据。采用偏相关网络和节点中心性进行评估，并检验了抑制功能障碍在童年创伤与情绪加工关系中的中介效应。此外，根据参与者的社会快感缺失水平将其分为高、中、低三组，分别进行了网络比较检验和中介效应分析。结果：网络分析显示，童年创伤与认知重评和愉悦体验呈负相关，与表达抑制呈正相关。抑制功能障碍显著中介了童年创伤与情绪调节之间的关系。亚组分析表明，抑制功能障碍在童年创伤与认知重评关系中的显著中介效应仅存在于低社会快感缺失组，而在中、高社会快感缺失组中不显著。结论：本研究表明，抑制功能障碍在童年创伤与情绪调节之间起重要作用，且在中度至高度社会快感缺失个体中该作用被破坏。这些发现强调了在为创伤相关情绪问题制定干预措施时，考虑抑制功能的必要性。
关键词：童年创伤，抑制功能障碍，情绪加工，社会快感缺失，情绪调节

title: Alcohol misuse as dysfunctional affect regulation: a network analysis of psychopathology across adulthood.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Alcohol misuse is increasingly understood as a maladaptive form of affect regulation. This study examines the interplay between alcohol misuse, mental health symptoms, and age in a representative sample of Austrian adults, using network analysis to model these associations.
METHODS: Data from 2007 participants (49% women; average age of 48.2 ± 16 years), representative of the general Austrian population in terms of age, gender, federal state, and educational level, were analyzed using validated instruments: the CAGE questionnaire for alcohol misuse, PHQ-9 for depression, GAD-7 for anxiety, ISI-7 for insomnia, and PSS-4 for stress. Network analysis using a regularized Gaussian graphical model was conducted to explore interrelations among these variables alongside age. Centrality, stability, and gender-based network comparisons were assessed.
RESULTS: Overall, 21% of participants screened positive for alcohol misuse (CAGE ≥2). Bivariate analyses showed that individuals with suspected alcohol dependence reported higher levels of depression, anxiety, stress, and insomnia, and were younger. The regularized network analysis revealed a robust connection between alcohol misuse and depressive symptoms. Depression and anxiety emerged as central nodes in the network, while age was negatively associated with both alcohol misuse and psychopathological burden. No significant gender differences in network structure or global strength were found.
CONCLUSIONS: Findings support the conceptualization of alcohol misuse as a dysfunctional affect regulation strategy, particularly in relation to depressive symptoms. These results align with transdiagnostic models of emotional dysregulation and reinforce the need for preventive interventions focused on emotion regulation skills, particularly among younger adults and individuals with comorbid mental health conditions.

标题：酒精滥用作为功能失调的情感调节：一项跨成年期精神病理学的网络分析
摘要：背景：酒精滥用越来越被理解为一种适应不良的情感调节形式。本研究使用网络分析模型，在奥地利成年人代表性样本中考察酒精滥用、心理健康症状和年龄之间的相互作用。方法：对2007名参与者（49%为女性；平均年龄48.2±16岁）的数据进行分析，这些样本在年龄、性别、联邦州和教育水平方面代表奥地利普通人群。使用经过验证的工具：酒精滥用采用CAGE问卷，抑郁采用PHQ-9，焦虑采用GAD-7，失眠采用ISI-7，压力采用PSS-4。通过正则化高斯图形模型进行网络分析，以探索这些变量与年龄之间的相互关系。评估了中心性、稳定性以及基于性别的网络比较。结果：总体而言，21%的参与者筛查出酒精滥用阳性（CAGE≥2）。双变量分析表明，疑似酒精依赖的个体报告了更高水平的抑郁、焦虑、压力和失眠，且年龄更轻。正则化网络分析揭示了酒精滥用与抑郁症状之间的强关联。抑郁和焦虑在网络中表现为中心节点，而年龄与酒精滥用和精神病理学负担均呈负相关。未发现网络结构或全局强度存在显著的性别差异。结论：研究结果支持将酒精滥用概念化为一种功能失调的情感调节策略，特别是与抑郁症状相关。这些发现与情感失调的跨诊断模型一致，并强化了针对情绪调节技能的预防性干预需求，尤其是在年轻成年人和共病心理健康问题的个体中。
关键词：酒精滥用；情感调节；网络分析；抑郁症状；精神病理学

title: Quality of engagement with in-the-moment digital CBT during periods of distress: A study of patients with suicidal thoughts and behaviors.
summary: Practicing CBT skills outside of therapy sessions is a core component of effective treatment, yet meaningful engagement can be difficult during periods of elevated psychological distress. Smartphone-based ecological momentary interventions (EMIs) offer a promising approach to support real-time skill use, but most research has focused on frequency rather than quality of engagement. This study examined the quality of CBT skills practice in a 28-day smartphone-based EMI following inpatient discharge and explored its associations with internal context and intervention effectiveness. Twenty-three adults hospitalized for suicidal thoughts and behaviors participated, selecting and practicing one of three guided CBT skills exercises (Mindful Emotional Awareness, Countering Emotional Behavior, or Cognitive Flexibility) up to three times daily. A structured coding system was used to rate the completeness and relevance of 945 total exercises (0-2 scale). Quality varied primarily within individuals and was lower during moments of high suicidal intent and urge. When combining across all skills, quality was not associated with proximal change. However, higher-quality Countering Emotional Behavior practice predicted greater reductions in suicidal intent, and higher-quality Countering Emotional Behavior and Cognitive Flexibility practice predicted greater reductions in anger. These findings suggest that momentary distress can impact engagement quality, and that the short-term impact of skills practice may depend on both the specific CBT strategy and type of distress targeted. Understanding and enhancing engagement quality is a key step toward optimizing mobile interventions for individuals in the midst of psychological distress.

标题：痛苦期间实时数字认知行为治疗参与的质与量：伴有自杀意念和行为患者的研究
摘要：在治疗会话之外练习认知行为治疗（CBT）技能是有效治疗的核心组成部分，但在心理痛苦加剧期间，有意义的参与可能很困难。基于智能手机的生态瞬时干预（EMI）为支持实时技能使用提供了一种有前景的方法，但大多数研究关注的是参与的频率而非质量。本研究在住院患者出院后为期28天的智能手机EMI中检验了CBT技能练习的质量，并探讨了其与内部情境及干预效果的关系。23名因自杀意念和行为住院的成年人参与，每天最多三次选择并练习三种指导性CBT技能练习中的一种（正念情绪觉察、对抗情绪行为或认知灵活性）。采用结构化编码系统对总共945次练习的完整性和相关性进行评分（0-2分制）。质量主要在不同个体间存在差异，并在自杀意图和冲动较高的时刻较低。当结合所有技能时，质量与近端改变无关。然而，更高质量的对抗情绪行为练习预测了自杀意图的更大降低，而更高质量的对抗情绪行为和认知灵活性练习预测了愤怒的更大降低。这些发现表明，瞬时痛苦可能影响参与质量，且技能练习的短期效果可能取决于特定的CBT策略及所针对的痛苦类型。理解和提升参与质量是优化针对心理痛苦中个体的移动干预的关键步骤。
关键词：情绪；认知行为治疗；生态瞬时干预；自杀行为；参与质量

title: Prefrontal activation and inhibitory performance in the association between anxiety and sleep quality: An fNIRS investigation.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Anxiety and sleep disturbances are closely linked, yet their underlying neural and cognitive associations remain insufficiently understood. This study examined the roles of prefrontal cortex (PFC) activation and inhibitory performance in this relationship within a clinical context.
METHODS: A total of 181 participants, including 91 patients with anxiety disorders and 90 age- and sex-matched healthy controls (HCs), completed Zung's Self-rating Anxiety Scale (SAS), the Pittsburgh Sleep Quality Index (PSQI), and the color-word Stroop task. Prefrontal activation during the task was measured using functional near-infrared spectroscopy (fNIRS).
RESULTS: Compared to HCs, patients with anxiety disorders exhibited poorer sleep quality, slower response time, lower inhibitory accuracy, and reduced PFC activation (all p < 0.001). No group differences were found in task-related functional connectivity (p = 0.94). Anxiety was positively associated with poorer sleep quality (r = 0.76, p < 0.001) and impaired inhibitory performance (r = 0.46, p < 0.001), and negatively associated with PFC activation (r = -0.6 to -0.2, p < 0.05). Poor sleep quality was positively associated with inhibitory deficits (r = 0.5, p < 0.001) and negatively associated with PFC activation (r = -0.59 to -0.19, p < 0.05). Serial mediation analysis showed that dorsolateral PFC (DLPFC) activation and inhibitory performance sequentially mediated the relationship between anxiety and sleep quality.
CONCLUSIONS: Our findings suggest that DLPFC activation and inhibitory control serve as neurocognitive pathways linking anxiety and sleep quality. Interventions enhancing inhibitory function may thus improve sleep quality and overall functioning in individuals with anxiety disorders.

标题：焦虑与睡眠质量关联中的前额叶激活与抑制表现：一项功能性近红外光谱研究  
摘要：背景：焦虑与睡眠障碍密切相关，但其潜在的神经和认知关联仍未被充分理解。本研究在临床背景下探讨了前额叶皮层（PFC）激活和抑制表现在这一关系中的作用。  
方法：共181名参与者，包括91名焦虑障碍患者和90名年龄性别匹配的健康对照（HCs），完成了Zung's自评焦虑量表（SAS）、匹兹堡睡眠质量指数（PSQI）以及色词Stroop任务。使用功能性近红外光谱（fNIRS）测量任务期间的前额叶激活。  
结果：与健康对照组相比，焦虑障碍患者表现出更差的睡眠质量、更慢的反应时间、更低的抑制准确性和更低的PFC激活（所有p < 0.001）。在任务相关的功能连接上未发现组间差异（p = 0.94）。焦虑与较差的睡眠质量（r = 0.76, p < 0.001）和受损的抑制表现（r = 0.46, p < 0.001）呈正相关，与PFC激活呈负相关（r = -0.6至-0.2, p < 0.05）。较差的睡眠质量与抑制缺陷呈正相关（r = 0.5, p < 0.001），与PFC激活呈负相关（r = -0.59至-0.19, p < 0.05）。系列中介分析显示，背外侧前额叶（DLPFC）激活和抑制表现依次中介了焦虑与睡眠质量之间的关系。  
结论：我们的发现表明，DLPFC激活和抑制控制作为神经认知通路连接了焦虑与睡眠质量。因此，增强抑制功能的干预措施可能改善焦虑障碍患者的睡眠质量和整体功能。  
关键词：焦虑；睡眠质量；前额叶激活；抑制控制；功能性近红外光谱

title: Depressive and anxiety symptoms in individuals with Long-COVID: Does social network matter? - Results of a German Long-COVID study.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Some patients previously infected with SARS-CoV-2 develop symptoms that are summarized under the term Long COVID (LC). There is limited evidence on how social characteristics influence depressive and anxiety symptoms in adults with LC.
METHODS: Depressive symptoms were assessed using the Center for Epidemiological Studies Depression Scale (CES-D). Anxiety symptoms were measured using the Generalized Anxiety Disorder Scale (GAD-7). The living situation (alone vs. with someone) was assessed by a single question. The social network was assessed using the Lubben Social Network Scale (LSNS). Multivariate regression analysis was performed.
RESULTS: In n = 410 participants with LC (mean age = 47.12, SD = 12.24) from Leipzig, Germany, we found that living with others was associated with fewer depressive symptoms compared to living alone (B = -2.18, p = .011). A larger social network was associated with fewer anxiety symptoms in adults with LC symptoms (IRR = 0.99, p = .008).
CONCLUSION: Social factors, such as social network and living situation, are associated with mental health factors like depressive and anxiety symptoms in adults with LC. Further research is required in order to elucidate the complex interplay between social factors and mental health in people with LC in the context of longitudinal studies. Future research directions are discussed.

标题：长期新冠患者的抑郁和焦虑症状：社交网络是否重要？——一项德国长期新冠研究的结果
摘要：背景：部分既往感染SARS-CoV-2的患者会出现被统称为“长期新冠”（LC）的症状。关于社会特征如何影响LC成人患者抑郁和焦虑症状的证据有限。方法：采用流行病学研究中心抑郁量表（CES-D）评估抑郁症状，采用广泛性焦虑障碍量表（GAD-7）测量焦虑症状，通过单一问题评估居住状况（独居或与他人同住），并使用Lubben社交网络量表（LSNS）评估社交网络。进行了多元回归分析。结果：在来自德国莱比锡的410名LC参与者（平均年龄=47.12岁，SD=12.24）中，我们发现与他人同住者相比独居者抑郁症状更少（B=-2.18，p=0.011）。在有LC症状的成人中，较大的社交网络与较少的焦虑症状相关（IRR=0.99，p=0.008）。结论：社会因素（如社交网络和居住状况）与LC成人患者的心理健康因素（如抑郁和焦虑症状）相关。需进一步开展纵向研究以阐明LC患者社会因素与心理健康之间的复杂相互作用。本文讨论了未来的研究方向。
关键词：长期新冠；抑郁症状；焦虑症状；社交网络；心理健康

title: Predictors of momentary emotion differentiation among veterans in residential treatment for posttraumatic stress disorder: An ecological momentary assessment study.
summary: Emotion differentiation refers to the specificity with which people describe their emotional experiences. Low emotion differentiation has been linked to affective disorders but understudied in posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD), despite a wide range of symptoms representing affective dysregulation (e.g., avoidance of trauma-related emotions). Additionally, although emotion differentiation is conceptualized as a skill that may improve with mental health treatment, it has been primarily studied as a trait rather than momentary construct, limiting opportunities to understand contextual factors. Using multilevel modeling, we examined predictors of momentary negative emotion differentiation (NED) and positive emotion differentiation (PED) in 63 US veterans in residential PTSD treatment completing ecological momentary assessment (EMA) of emotions five times a day for an average of 30 days. Predictors were initial PTSD severity (via clinical interview), time in treatment (day post-admission), and the presence of a service dog (a unique component of the treatment program). Covariates were mean negative affect or positive affect. After controlling for mean affect, PTSD severity was associated with both lower momentary NED and PED, highlighting these as potential treatment targets. Time in treatment did not emerge consistently as a predictor which may have been due to EMA occurring during the second half of treatment. The presence of a service dog was associated with higher momentary PED, which may parallel past findings on people experiencing higher momentary PED in more (versus less) familiar situations. Future research is needed to elucidate the time course and types of PTSD interventions in producing potential benefits in emotion differentiation.

标题：创伤后应激障碍住院治疗退伍军人情绪分化瞬时预测因素：一项生态瞬时评估研究  
摘要：情绪分化指个体描述自身情绪体验的特异性程度。低情绪分化与情感障碍相关，但在创伤后应激障碍（PTSD）中尚未得到充分研究，尽管其症状广泛涉及情感失调（如回避创伤相关情绪）。此外，尽管情绪分化被概念化为一种可能通过心理健康治疗改善的技能，但现有研究主要将其视为特质而非瞬时构念，限制了对情境因素的理解。本研究采用多层模型，对63名参加住院PTSD治疗的美国退伍军人进行了平均30天、每天5次的瞬时情绪生态评估（EMA），以考察瞬时负性情绪分化（NED）和正性情绪分化（PED）的预测因素。预测变量包括初始PTSD严重程度（临床访谈评估）、治疗时间（入院后天数）及服务犬的存在（治疗项目的独特组成部分）。协变量为平均负性或正性情绪。在控制平均情绪后，PTSD严重程度与较低的瞬时NED和PED均相关，表明这些可能是潜在治疗靶点。治疗时间未呈现一致预测效应，可能由于EMA发生在治疗后半阶段。服务犬的存在与较高的瞬时PED相关，这与过往研究发现个体在更熟悉（相较于不熟悉）情境中瞬时PED更高的结果一致。未来研究需阐明PTSD干预措施在促进情绪分化方面的时间进程及类型。  
关键词：情绪分化；创伤后应激障碍；生态瞬时评估；服务犬；情感失调

title: Emotional dysregulation and psychological symptomatology in university students: The mediating role of perceived academic performance.
summary:
OBJECTIVE: This study aimed to examine psychological symptomatology among Italian university students by testing the mediating role of perceived academic performance in the association between emotional dysregulation and multiple mental health outcomes, including well-being, symptoms, functioning, and risk.
METHODS: A total of 1134 students from the University of Chieti-Pescara completed an online survey between March and July 2025. Measures included the Difficulties in Emotion Regulation Scale-Short Form (DERS-SF), the Clinical Outcomes in Routine Evaluation-Outcome Measure (CORE-OM), and a 12-item scale assessing the perception of academic performance. Path analysis was conducted using Jamovi with maximum likelihood estimation to test the hypothesized mediation model.
RESULTS: Emotional dysregulation was negatively associated with perceived academic performance and positively related to all domains of psychological symptomatology. Perceived academic performance was significantly related to well-being, symptoms, functioning, and risk. Indirect effects indicated that perceived academic performance partially mediated the relationship between emotional dysregulation and psychological outcomes, accounting for up to 54% of the variance in psychological symptomatology.
CONCLUSION: Findings indicate that emotional dysregulation is strongly associated with psychological symptomatology among university students and that perceived academic performance functions both as an outcome and a mediator in this relationship, underscoring its relevance within models of emotional dysregulation in student populations.

标题：大学生情绪失调与心理症状：感知学业表现的中介作用
摘要：目的：本研究旨在考察意大利大学生心理症状，通过检验感知学业表现在情绪失调与多种心理健康结局（包括幸福感、症状、功能和风险）关联中的中介作用。方法：2025年3月至7月间，来自基耶蒂-佩斯卡拉大学的1134名学生完成了一项在线调查。测量工具包括情绪调节困难量表简版（DERS-SF）、常规评估临床结局-结局测量（CORE-OM）以及一个评估学业表现感知的12条目量表。采用Jamovi软件进行路径分析，使用最大似然估计法检验假设的中介模型。结果：情绪失调与感知学业表现呈负相关，与心理症状各维度呈正相关。感知学业表现与幸福感、症状、功能和风险显著相关。间接效应表明，感知学业表现在情绪失调与心理结局的关系中起部分中介作用，解释了心理症状高达54%的方差。结论：研究结果表明，情绪失调与大学生心理症状密切相关，感知学业表现在此关系中既作为结局变量又作为中介变量，强调了其在学生群体情绪失调模型中的重要性。
关键词：情绪失调；心理症状；感知学业表现；大学生；中介作用

title: Visual cortical functional connectivity alterations and their associations with psychotic symptoms in early-onset bipolar disorder.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Visual cortical dysfunction has been implicated in the early stages of psychosis and associated with psychotic symptoms. However, the functional connectivity (FC) of visual regions in early-onset bipolar disorder (EOBD) remains poorly understood. This study aimed to examine visual-related FC alterations in EOBD and explore their associations with psychiatric symptoms and clinical characteristics.
METHODS: Eighty-eight EOBD individuals and 56 healthy controls (HCs) underwent resting-state functional MRI. Visual cortical regions were selected by seeds from a probabilistic visual atlas. Twenty-five seed-based FC were compared between groups. Partial correlations with multiple comparison corrections were conducted to examine associations between altered FC and psychiatric symptoms in EOBD.
RESULTS: Compared to HCs, 14 visual cortical seeds showed higher FC with frontal and posterior temporal areas, while 5 visual cortical seeds showed lower FC with temporal and sensorimotor related regions. Higher psychotic positive, negative, and general scores were significantly associated with higher FC in visual and frontal regions, particularly involving the right lateral occipital complex area 1 (LO1), LO2, human middle temporal visual area (hMT/V5), intraparietal sulcus (IPS5), precentral gyri, and superior frontal gyri.
CONCLUSION: Individuals with EOBD exhibited altered visual system connectivity, characterized by higher FC with frontal regions and lower FC with sensorimotor and emotion regulation related regions. These findings suggest that visual-related FC abnormalities may emerge in the early course of BD and are associated with psychotic symptoms, potentially serving as early markers of vulnerability to psychosis.

相关性：是  
标题：早发性双相障碍中视觉皮层功能连接改变及其与精神病性症状的关联  
摘要：背景：视觉皮层功能障碍已被认为与精神病早期阶段及精神病性症状相关。然而，早发性双相障碍中视觉区域的功能连接仍知之甚少。本研究旨在探讨早发性双相障碍中视觉相关功能连接的改变，并探索其与精神症状及临床特征的关联。  
方法：对88名早发性双相障碍患者和56名健康对照者进行静息态功能磁共振成像。依据概率性视觉图谱中的种子点选择视觉皮层区域，比较两组间基于25个种子点的功能连接。采用多重比较校正的偏相关分析，检验早发性双相障碍中功能连接改变与精神症状之间的关联。  
结果：与健康对照相比，14个视觉皮层种子点与额叶及后颞叶区域的功能连接增强，而5个视觉皮层种子点与颞叶及感觉运动相关区域的功能连接减弱。更高的精神病性阳性、阴性及一般症状得分与视觉及额叶区域（尤其是右侧外侧枕叶复合体区域1、区域2、人类中颞叶视觉区、顶内沟及中央前回、额上回）的功能连接增强显著相关。  
结论：早发性双相障碍患者表现出视觉系统连接性改变，特征为与额叶区域功能连接增强、与感觉运动及情绪调节相关区域功能连接减弱。这些发现提示视觉相关功能连接异常可能在双相障碍病程早期出现，并与精神病性症状相关，可能作为精神病易感性的早期标志物。  
关键词：早发性双相障碍；视觉皮层；功能连接；精神病性症状；情绪调节

title: Syntactic complexity of written text as a structural linguistic marker of depressive symptoms.
summary:
BACKGROUND: Language analysis methods have been increasingly explored for the detection of depressive symptoms. However, current approaches have largely focused on analysing the thematic content of language, while the underlying structure and grammatical composition of language remains underexamined. The current study assessed features of syntactic complexity in written text as potential linguistic markers of depressive symptoms.
METHODS: Adult participants (n = 196) experiencing depressive symptoms completed four writing tasks (Personal Biography; Neutral Writing; Narrative Imagery; Letter to a Friend). Depressive symptoms were measured via the Patient Health Questionnaire-9 (PHQ-9). Linguistic features were extracted with the Tool for the Automatic Analysis of Syntactic Sophistication and Complexity (TAASSC). Bivariate correlations were used to assess associations between syntactic complexity features and depressive symptoms. Machine learning models developed with nested cross-validation were used to examine the combined value of syntactic complexity features in written text for predicting depressive symptoms.
RESULTS: Across writing tasks, bivariate correlations showed weak, negative associations between total PHQ-9 scores and both noun phrase complexity and syntactic sophistication. Best-performing machine learning models varied by writing task, and syntactic complexity features accounted for up to ∼7% of variance in depressive symptoms. Features of importance included syntactic sophistication, noun phrase complexity, and clause complexity.
CONCLUSION: Features of syntactic complexity within written text could serve as linguistic markers of depression. However, features were weakly associated with depression and varied across writing tasks. Combining features of syntactic complexity with other established linguistic markers may add value to language analysis methods used to detect depression.

相关性：是
标题：书面文本的句法复杂性作为抑郁症状的结构性语言标记
摘要：背景：语言分析方法在抑郁症状检测中的应用日益增多。然而，当前研究主要关注语言的主题内容分析，而语言的基本结构和语法组成仍未被充分探讨。本研究评估了书面文本中句法复杂性特征作为抑郁症状潜在语言标记的可能性。方法：196名存在抑郁症状的成年参与者完成了四项写作任务（个人传记、中性写作、叙事想象、给朋友的信）。抑郁症状通过患者健康问卷-9（PHQ-9）测量。语言特征通过句法复杂度与精密度自动分析工具（TAASSC）提取。采用双变量相关分析评估句法复杂性特征与抑郁症状之间的关联。通过嵌套交叉验证开发的机器学习模型，检验书面文本中句法复杂性特征在预测抑郁症状方面的综合价值。结果：在各项写作任务中，双变量相关分析显示，PHQ-9总分与名词短语复杂性及句法精密度之间存在弱负相关。表现最佳的机器学习模型因写作任务而异，句法复杂性特征可解释抑郁症状约7%的变异。重要特征包括句法精密度、名词短语复杂性和从句复杂性。结论：书面文本中的句法复杂性特征可作为抑郁症的语言标记。然而，这些特征与抑郁症的关联较弱，且因写作任务而异。将句法复杂性特征与其他已建立的语言标记相结合，可能提升用于抑郁症检测的语言分析方法的效度。
关键词：抑郁症状；句法复杂性；语言标记；机器学习；书面文本

title: Expression ambiguity leads to greater influence of predictive context during face emotion perception
summary: Context has been theoretically proposed to exert greater impact on face emotion processing when expressions are ambiguous. However, evidence for such ‘context-weighting’ as a function of expression ambiguity is very limited. We investigated the presence of context-weighting using emotive sentence cues that provided a predictive context for a neutral face that changed expression in response. Emotional expressions were either congruent or incongruent with the sentence cue. To modulate expression ambiguity we manipulated expression intensity: low (80%-intensity) and high (20%-intensity) ambiguity in Experiments 1a/b using angry and happy faces, with medium ambiguity (50%-intensity) added in Experiment 2 using disgust and sad faces. Participants categorised the face emotion. Error rates were lower when face expressions were congruent vs. incongruent with the predictive context. Crucially, congruency effects were larger when expressions were more ambiguous (Expts 1b and 2 especially), thus indicating greater context-weighting. Drift Diffusion Modelling revealed that this effect was underpinned by use of predictive context to improve the efficiency of face expression evidence accumulation. Our findings provide the first empirical evidence that emotion perception is based on flexible integration of both face and prior context within a predictive processing framework, with the degree of context-weighting determined by the level of expression ambiguity.

标题：表情歧义导致预测情境在面部情绪感知中具有更大影响
摘要：理论上认为，当面部表情存在歧义时，情境对面部情绪加工的影响更大。然而，关于这种表情歧义如何调节情境权重效应的实证证据非常有限。我们通过使用情绪性句子线索为中性面孔提供预测情境（该面孔会相应变化表情），研究了情境权重的存在。面部表情与句子线索一致或不一致。为调节表情歧义度，我们操纵了表情强度：实验1a/1b中使用愤怒和快乐面孔设置低歧义度（80%强度）和高歧义度（20%强度），实验2中使用厌恶和悲伤面孔增加中歧义度（50%强度）。要求被试对面部表情进行分类。结果发现，当面部表情与预测情境一致时，错误率显著低于不一致条件。关键的是，当表情歧义度更高时（尤其实验1b和实验2），一致性效应更大，表明情境权重效应更强。漂移扩散模型分析表明，该效应源于利用预测情境改善面部表情证据积累的效率。本研究首次提供实证证据表明，情绪感知是基于预测加工框架对面部信息与先验情境的灵活整合，而情境权重程度由表情歧义水平决定。
关键词：面部情绪感知；表情歧义；情境权重；预测加工；漂移扩散模型

title: Emotional women? Testing gender effects on emotion expression and recognition with genuine and dynamic emotion expressions
summary: Past research has suggested women are more emotionally expressive and perceptive, and this is typically endorsed as a belief shared by the public (Briton & Hall, 1995; Plant et al., 2000; Timmers et al., 2003). However, there is a growing literature of mixed results finding generally small effects of gender on expression and perception. Little research has used genuine expressions and perceptions to assess whether expression or perception of emotion in daily life differs by gender. In this study, we collected multiple emotional expressions and the corresponding self-reports of emotion experience. Expressions were collected from 128 participants (94 female; 34 male). Another 824 participants (494 female, 313 male, 17 other) reported what emotion they perceived in those expressions. This resulted in 3775 emotion perceptions from 772 expressions. No difference across genders was found for either emotion expression or emotion perception. This research aligns with broader research identifying that the effect of gender on emotion expression and perception is dependent on context and social expectations, and typically small when identified. With extended naturalistic expressions, any possible gender differences could not be detected.

相关性：是
标题：情绪化的女性？基于真实动态情绪表达检验性别对情绪表达与识别的影响
摘要：以往研究表明，女性在情绪表达和感知方面更为突出，这通常被视为公众普遍认同的看法（Briton & Hall, 1995; Plant et al., 2000; Timmers et al., 2003）。然而，越来越多的研究结果存在分歧，普遍发现性别对情绪表达和感知的影响较小。极少有研究采用真实情绪表达和感知来评估日常生活中情绪表达或感知是否存在性别差异。本研究收集了多种情绪表达及其对应的情绪体验自我报告，共采集128名参与者（94名女性；34名男性）的情绪表达。另外824名参与者（494名女性，313名男性，17名其他性别）报告了他们在这些表达中感知到的情绪。最终获得来自772个情绪表达的3775次情绪感知结果。研究发现，无论情绪表达还是情绪感知均未发现性别差异。本研究与更广泛的研究相一致，即性别对情绪表达和感知的影响依赖于情境和社会期望，即便存在影响也通常较小。在扩展的自然化情绪表达条件下，任何可能的性别差异均未被检测到。
关键词：情绪表达；情绪感知；性别差异；真实情绪；动态表情

title: Emotion Regulation: The Interplay of Culture and Genes
summary:
Abstract
                  
                    Given the mounting empirical evidence to support both the cultural and biological shaping of emotional processes, there is a clear need to integrate these determinants of emotional processes. Much in the same vein as these efforts, in our research on gene‐culture interactions, we have examined how cultural and biological factors jointly influence emotion regulation. The present paper specifically aims to present research considering both cultural and genetic factors as two interacting influences that shape emotion regulation. A series of studies conducted to test the gene‐culture interaction involving OXTR
                    rs
                    53576 consistently show that individuals with the variant that is associated with socio‐emotional sensitivity tend to utilize culturally normative forms of emotion regulation more than those without it. These findings underscore the importance of considering the interplay between socio‐cultural and genetic factors that shape social behaviors.

标题：情绪调节：文化与基因的相互作用
摘要：鉴于越来越多的实证证据支持情绪过程的文化和生物学塑造，显然需要整合情绪过程的这些决定因素。与这些努力类似，在我们的基因-文化相互作用研究中，我们考察了文化和生物因素如何共同影响情绪调节。本文特别旨在展示将文化和遗传因素视为塑造情绪调节的两种相互作用影响的研究。一系列涉及OXTR rs53576基因-文化相互作用的实验一致表明，携带与社会情感敏感性相关基因变异体的个体，比未携带者更倾向于使用符合文化规范的情绪调节策略。这些发现强调了考虑塑造社会行为的社会文化和遗传因素之间相互作用的重要性。
关键词：情绪调节、基因-文化相互作用、OXTR rs53576、社会情感敏感性、文化规范

title: The Therapist as a Privileged Environment: How the Relational Body of the Clinician Shapes Perception, Arousal, Attention, Emotion, and Cognition in Children with Autism Spectrum Disorder
summary: Conventional models of autism intervention tend to conceptualize the therapist as an external agentwho selectively reinforces, models, or teaches behaviors in a child with Autism Spectrum Disorder(ASD). Drawing on theoretic and experimental research, this work argues that relocating thetherapist within the interpersonal system rather than above it or outside it is not only theoreticallysound but clinically consequential. Crucially, we extend existing formulations by proposing that thetherapist’s regulatory function is not defined solely by maintaining a stable and internally coherentautonomic state. Experimental evidence and clinical work suggest that regulation in autism therapyis shaped by the therapist’s capacity for flexible, moment-to-moment modulation of embodiedsignals — including posture, facial expressiveness, vocal prosody, movement tempo, and evenrespiratory rhythm — in response to the child’s changing affective and autonomic states. This articleproposes a model in which the therapist is not merely a provider of techniques or a neutral deliverysystem, but constitutes a privileged environment for the child in the sense of a dynamic, sensory,relational, and regulatory context whose moment-to-moment properties actively shape how the childperceives, becomes aroused, directs attention, regulates emotion, and constructs cognition.
