相关性：是
标题：治疗师作为特权环境：临床医生的具身关系如何塑造自闭症谱系障碍儿童的感知、唤醒、注意、情绪和认知
摘要：传统的自闭症干预模式倾向于将治疗师视为一个外部施动者，有选择性地强化、示范或教授自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）儿童的行为。基于理论和实验研究，本文认为将治疗师重新定位于人际系统之内（而非之上或之外）不仅在理论上合理，而且在临床实践中具有重要意义。关键的是，我们扩展了现有理论框架，提出治疗师的调节功能并不仅仅由维持稳定且内部连贯的自主神经状态所定义。实验证据和临床工作表明，自闭症治疗中的调节作用受到治疗师能否根据儿童不断变化的情感与自主状态，灵活且即时地调节具身信号（包括姿势、面部表情表达、语音韵律、运动节律甚至呼吸节奏）的能力所塑造。本文提出一个模型，在该模型中，治疗师不仅是技术提供者或中立的传递系统，而是构成儿童的特权环境——一种动态的、感官的、关系的和调节性的环境，其即时属性积极塑造儿童如何感知、被唤醒、引导注意、调节情绪以及构建认知。
关键词：自闭症谱系障碍；治疗师具身调节；情绪与认知；人际系统；面部与语音表情

title: The Intensity of Emotion
summary: A theory is outlined that assumes that emotions are motivational states with the special function of producing adaptation to situational conditions. The theory assumes that the emotional system lies in the central nervous system, that it is fast to react, able to change quickly from one emotional state to another, produces only one emotion at a time, and that the intensity of that emotion is a nonmonotonic function of deterrence to the aim of the emotion. Supporting data from several experimental tests are reported, and selected theoretical problems are discussed.
translation:
相关性：是
标题：情绪的强度
摘要：本文概述了一种理论，该理论假设情绪是动机状态，其特殊功能是产生对情境条件的适应。该理论假设情绪系统位于中枢神经系统中，反应迅速，能够快速从一种情绪状态转变为另一种情绪状态，一次只产生一种情绪，并且该情绪的强度是对情绪目标阻碍程度的非单调函数。文中报告了来自多项实验测试的支持数据，并讨论了选定的理论问题。
关键词：情绪强度；情绪动机；中枢神经系统；非单调函数；适应性

title: Understanding the Impact of Face Masks on the Processing of Facial Identity, Emotion, Age, and Gender
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has introduced new challenges for governments and individuals. Unprecedented efforts at reducing virus transmission launched a novel arena for human face recognition in which faces are partially occluded with masks. Previous studies have shown that masks decrease accuracy of face identity and emotion recognition. The current study focuses on the impact of masks on the speed of processing of these and other important social dimensions. Here we provide a systematic assessment of the impact of COVID-19 masks on facial identity, emotion, gender, and age. Four experiments (N = 116) were conducted in which participants categorized faces on a predefined dimension (e.g., emotion). Both speed and accuracy were measured. The results revealed that masks hindered the perception of virtually all tested facial dimensions (i.e., emotion, gender, age, and identity), interfering with normal speed and accuracy of categorization. We also found that the unwarranted effects of masks were not due to holistic processes, because the Face Inversion Effect (FIE) was generally not larger with unmasked compared with masked faces. Moreover, we found that the impact of masks is not automatic and that under some contexts observers can control at least part of their detrimental effects.

相关性：是
标题：理解口罩对面部身份、情绪、年龄和性别加工的影响
摘要：COVID-19疫情为政府和个人带来了新的挑战。为减少病毒传播而采取的前所未有的努力开创了人脸识别的新领域，其中人脸部分被口罩遮挡。以往研究表明，口罩会降低面部身份和情绪识别的准确性。本研究聚焦于口罩对这些及其他重要社会维度加工速度的影响。我们系统评估了COVID-19口罩对面部身份、情绪、性别和年龄的影响。共进行了四项实验（N = 116），参与者需对预定义维度（如情绪）的面孔进行分类，并同时测量了反应速度和准确性。结果显示，口罩阻碍了几乎所有测试的面部维度（即情绪、性别、年龄和身份）的感知，干扰了正常的分类速度和准确性。我们还发现，口罩的不利影响并非源于整体加工过程，因为面部倒置效应（FIE）在未戴口罩与戴口罩的面孔之间总体上没有显著差异。此外，口罩的影响并非自动化的，在某些情境下，观察者可以至少部分控制其不利效果。
关键词：口罩；面部加工；情绪识别；身份识别；社会认知

title: The role of artistic creativity in predicting difficulties in emotion regulation and reducing social anxiety: insights from a cross-sectional analysis
summary:
Background:
                    Social anxiety disorder (SAD) is a common psychiatric condition marked by an intense fear of negative evaluation and social avoidance, which can significantly impair quality of life. Recent research has highlighted the importance of emotion regulation in the development and maintenance of SAD. Artistic creativity has been suggested as a potential factor that can enhance emotion regulation and reduce social anxiety. This study aimed to investigate the relationship between artistic creativity, emotion regulation difficulties, and social anxiety in adults.
                  
                  
                    Methods:
                    This correlational, descriptive study was conducted with a sample of 320 participants, including university students and professional or semi-professional artists from Tehran. Participants were selected through convenience sampling. Data were collected using the Torrance Tests of Creative Thinking, the Difficulties in Emotion Regulation Scale, and the Liebowitz Social Anxiety Scale. Pearson correlation and multiple regression analyses were performed using SPSS version 26.
                  
                  
                    Results:
                    
                      The results revealed a significant negative correlation between artistic creativity and both emotion regulation difficulties (r = − 0.42,
                      P
                      < 0.01) and social anxiety (r = − 0.38,
                      P
                      < 0.01). Additionally, multiple regression analysis showed that artistic creativity significantly predicted 18% of the variance in emotion regulation difficulties and 15% of the variance in social anxiety (
                      P
                      < 0.01).
                    
                  
                  
                    Conclusion:
                    These findings suggest that enhancing artistic creativity may serve as a protective factor in improving emotion regulation and reducing social anxiety. It is recommended that creative arts programs be incorporated into mental health promotion initiatives, particularly in academic and cultural settings.
translation:

标题：艺术创造力在预测情绪调节困难与减少社交焦虑中的作用：一项横断面分析的研究启示
摘要：背景：社交焦虑障碍（SAD）是一种常见的精神疾病，其特征是对负面评价的强烈恐惧和社交回避，会显著损害生活质量。近期研究强调了情绪调节在SAD发生和维持中的重要性。艺术创造力被认为是一种可能增强情绪调节并减少社交焦虑的潜在因素。本研究旨在探讨成人艺术创造力、情绪调节困难与社交焦虑之间的关系。方法：这项描述性相关研究以320名参与者为样本，包括来自德黑兰的大学生及专业或半专业艺术家。参与者通过便利抽样选取。数据收集采用托兰斯创造性思维测验、情绪调节困难量表和利博维茨社交焦虑量表。使用SPSS 26版进行皮尔逊相关分析和多元回归分析。结果：结果显示，艺术创造力与情绪调节困难（r = − 0.42, P < 0.01）及社交焦虑（r = − 0.38, P < 0.01）均呈显著负相关。此外，多元回归分析表明，艺术创造力显著预测了情绪调节困难18%的变异和社交焦虑15%的变异（P < 0.01）。结论：这些发现提示，增强艺术创造力可能是改善情绪调节和减少社交焦虑的保护性因素。建议在心理健康促进计划中融入创意艺术项目，尤其是在学术和文化环境中。
关键词：艺术创造力；情绪调节；社交焦虑；情绪调节困难；横断面研究

title: Relationship Between Emotional States, Emotion Regulation and Executive Functions in Professional Female Football Players
summary: Soccer performance depends on multiple interacting factors, including physical, technical, tactical, and psychological components. Among the psychological factors associated with optimal performance are athletes’ emotional states, their regulation, and executive functions. These processes support attention to relevant external stimuli and enable players to plan, adapt, and regulate their behavior during gameplay. Although executive functions and emotional states have been widely studied in sport settings, research examining the relationship between these variables in athletes is limited, particularly in female soccer players. The aim of this study was to explore the relationship between emotional states, emotional regulation, and performance on cognitive tasks in female players from the Mexican soccer league. Twenty-eight players participated in two individual assessment sessions in which anxiety and depression levels, emotional regulation, and executive functions—planning, inhibitory control, working memory, and cognitive flexibility—were evaluated using psychological and neuropsychological tests. Results indicated a relationship between aspects of decision-making and players’ emotional regulation abilities, as well as between depression levels and onset latency in a working memory task. These findings support the existence of an association between emotional processes and cognitive functioning in female soccer players.

标题：职业女子足球运动员情绪状态、情绪调节与执行功能的关系
摘要：足球表现取决于多种交互作用的因素，包括身体、技术、战术和心理成分。在与最佳表现相关的心理因素中，包括运动员的情绪状态、情绪调节以及执行功能。这些过程有助于关注相关的外部刺激，并使球员能够在比赛过程中计划、适应和调节自身行为。尽管执行功能和情绪状态在体育环境中已被广泛研究，但在运动员中探讨这些变量之间关系的研究仍然有限，尤其是在女性足球运动员中。本研究旨在探索墨西哥女子足球联赛球员的情绪状态、情绪调节与认知任务表现之间的关系。28名球员参与了两项个体评估，使用心理和神经心理测试评估了焦虑和抑郁水平、情绪调节以及执行功能——包括计划、抑制控制、工作记忆和认知灵活性。结果表明，决策方面的能力与球员的情绪调节能力之间存在关系，抑郁水平与工作记忆任务中的开始潜伏期也相关。这些发现支持了女性足球运动员中情绪过程与认知功能之间存在关联。
关键词：情绪状态；情绪调节；执行功能；女子足球运动员；认知任务

title: Ketamine and facial emotion recognition in treatment-resistant depression: a computational account
summary: Background: Facial emotion recognition deficits are well defined in depression but understudied in treatment-resistant depression (TRD). Over the past decades, subanesthetic doses of ketamine have emerged as an effective treatment for TRD, but its effect on affective processing is still little known. Approaches from computational psychiatry, such as sequential evidence sampling models of decision making, can provide useful insight into the underlying cognitive processes of facial emotion recognition in TRD patients before and after ketamine antidepressant treatment.Aim: Provide a computational account of facial emotion recognition in TRD and the effects of ketamine treatment using hierarchical drift diffusion modeling (HDDM).Method: In this observational case-control study, 24 TRD patients and 35 healthy controls completed a FER task. TRD patients were assessed before, 2-4 hours after the initial racemic ketamine infusion, and at one week of treatment. Healthy controls were assessed at similar intervals, without intervention, to assess baseline differences and potential learning effects related to task repetition. Accuracy and reaction times were analyzed and fit with an HDDM to formalize correct facial emotion recognition as a noisy evidence-accumulation process. Parameters of the best-fitting model were compared across groups and timepoints.Results: Before treatment, TRD patients were slower but as accurate as controls. Following ketamine, the patients were significantly faster than at baseline and compared with repeated testing in healthy controls. These effects were underpinned by longer nondecision times and wider decision boundaries in patients at baseline, both of which decreased after starting ketamine. There was no behavioral or computational evidence of a negative bias in patients.Conclusions: Results suggest that processes related to psychomotor slowing and response caution, rather than affective processing, underlie deficits observed during facial emotion recognition in TRD and can be restored after starting a ketamine treatment.

标题：氯胺酮与难治性抑郁症中的面部情绪识别：一种计算模型视角
摘要：背景：面部情绪识别缺陷在抑郁症中有明确记载，但在难治性抑郁症中研究不足。过去数十年，亚麻醉剂量的氯胺酮已成为治疗难治性抑郁症的有效手段，但其对情感加工的影响仍鲜为人知。计算精神病学的方法，如决策的序列证据采样模型，可为理解难治性抑郁症患者在接受氯胺酮抗抑郁治疗前后面部情绪识别的潜在认知过程提供有价值的见解。目的：通过层级漂移扩散模型，为难治性抑郁症中的面部情绪识别及氯胺酮治疗的影响提供计算模型解释。方法：在这项观察性病例对照研究中，24名难治性抑郁症患者和35名健康对照完成了一项面部情绪识别任务。难治性抑郁症患者在治疗前、首次消旋氯胺酮输注后2-4小时以及治疗一周后进行评估。健康对照组在相似的时间间隔内进行评估（无干预），以评估基线差异及与任务重复相关的潜在学习效应。分析准确率和反应时间，并拟合层级漂移扩散模型，将正确的面部情绪识别形式化为一个含噪声的证据积累过程。比较各组和各时间点最佳拟合模型的参数。结果：治疗前，难治性抑郁症患者反应更慢但准确率与对照组相当。氯胺酮治疗后，患者反应速度显著快于基线水平，且快于健康对照组的重复测试。这些效应源于基线时患者更长的非决策时间和更宽的决策边界，两者在氯胺酮治疗后均下降。患者中未发现行为或计算证据支持负性偏向。结论：结果表明，难治性抑郁症患者在面部情绪识别中观察到的缺陷源于与精神运动迟缓和反应谨慎性相关的过程（而非情感加工过程），这些过程可在开始氯胺酮治疗后得到恢复。
关键词：氯胺酮，难治性抑郁症，面部情绪识别，计算精神病学，层级漂移扩散模型

title: Developmental change and cross‐domain links in vocal and musical emotion recognition performance in childhood
summary: Although the configurations of psychoacoustic cues signalling emotions in human vocalizations and instrumental music are very similar, cross‐domain links in recognition performance have yet to be studied developmentally. Two hundred and twenty 5‐ to 10‐year‐old children were asked to identify musical excerpts and vocalizations as happy, sad, or fearful. The results revealed age‐related increases in overall recognition performance with significant correlations across vocal and musical conditions at all developmental stages. Recognition scores were greater for musical than vocal stimuli and were superior in females compared with males. These results confirm that recognition of emotions in vocal and musical stimuli is linked by 5 years and that sensitivity to emotions in auditory stimuli is influenced by age and gender.

标题：儿童期嗓音与音乐情绪识别表现的发展变化及跨域联系

摘要：尽管人类嗓音和器乐音乐中传递情绪的心理声学线索配置非常相似，但跨域识别表现在发展层面尚未得到系统研究。本研究以220名5至10岁儿童为对象，要求其将音乐片段和嗓音表达识别为快乐、悲伤或恐惧。结果显示，总体识别表现随年龄增长而提升，且在所有发展阶段，嗓音与音乐条件下的识别成绩均存在显著相关。相较于嗓音刺激，儿童对音乐刺激的情绪识别得分更高，且女性表现优于男性。这些结果证实，至5岁时，儿童对嗓音和音乐刺激中的情绪识别已存在联系，而听觉刺激中的情绪敏感性受年龄和性别影响。

关键词：情绪识别；嗓音表情；音乐表情；儿童发展；跨域联系

title: Masked Face Emotion Recognition Based on Facial Landmarks and Deep Learning Approaches for Visually Impaired People
summary: Current artificial intelligence systems for determining a person’s emotions rely heavily on lip and mouth movement and other facial features such as eyebrows, eyes, and the forehead. Furthermore, low-light images are typically classified incorrectly because of the dark region around the eyes and eyebrows. In this work, we propose a facial emotion recognition method for masked facial images using low-light image enhancement and feature analysis of the upper features of the face with a convolutional neural network. The proposed approach employs the AffectNet image dataset, which includes eight types of facial expressions and 420,299 images. Initially, the facial input image’s lower parts are covered behind a synthetic mask. Boundary and regional representation methods are used to indicate the head and upper features of the face. Secondly, we effectively adopt a facial landmark detection method-based feature extraction strategy using the partially covered masked face’s features. Finally, the features, the coordinates of the landmarks that have been identified, and the histograms of the oriented gradients are then incorporated into the classification procedure using a convolutional neural network. An experimental evaluation shows that the proposed method surpasses others by achieving an accuracy of 69.3% on the AffectNet dataset.

标题：基于面部关键点和深度学习方法的蒙面人脸情绪识别（针对视障人士）
摘要：当前用于判断人类情绪的人工智能系统严重依赖于嘴唇和嘴巴的运动以及其他面部特征，如眉毛、眼睛和前额。此外，由于眼睛和眉毛周围区域的黑暗，低光照图像通常会被错误分类。在本研究中，我们提出了一种针对蒙面面部图像的情绪识别方法，该方法利用低光照图像增强技术和卷积神经网络对上脸特征进行分析。所提出的方法采用了包含八种面部表情和420,299张图像的AffectNet图像数据集。首先，面部输入图像的下半部分被合成口罩覆盖。采用边界和区域表示方法来指示头部和上脸特征。其次，我们有效地采用基于面部关键点检测方法的特征提取策略，利用部分被覆盖的蒙面面部特征。最后，这些特征、已识别的关键点坐标以及方向梯度直方图被整合到使用卷积神经网络的分类过程中。实验评估表明，所提出的方法在AffectNet数据集上达到了69.3%的准确率，超越了其他方法。
关键词：面部表情识别；情绪识别；深度学习；面部关键点；视障人士

title: Unveiling Infant Surprise in a Social Context: A Multidimensional Analysis of Physiological, Behavioural, and Facial Expression Markers.
summary: Surprise is a cornerstone of early learning, yet identifying it in preverbal infants is challenging because many of its markers are confounded with attention or social engagement. We aimed to identify indicators specific to surprise using behavioral and physiological measures. Ninety-nine infants aged 14–22 months observed five tool-use demonstrations presented either neutrally or surprisingly. We measured social gazes, facial expressions of surprise, freezing behavior, heart rate and electrodermal activity at 1- and 3-seconds post-stimulus. Bayesian mixed-effects models and factorial analyses were used to distinguish surprise from sustained attention or affect. Gaze duration toward the experimenter was the most reliable indicator of surprise: infants looked longer at the experimenter in the surprising than in the neutral condition, especially after the first demonstration. Facial expressions of surprise and freezing were higher in the surprising than in the neutral condition, but their persistence across demonstrations suggests that they indexed sustained attention rather than surprise per se. Heart rate emerged as a correlate of surprise-related arousal, mirroring the pattern observed for the duration of social gazes, whereas electrodermal activity followed a distinct profile, with larger responses in the neutral condition and associations with reduced gaze responses, interpreted as an index of frustration or fatigue. Factorial analyses provided converging evidence for this interpretation by isolating distinct clusters of measures linked to surprise and to sustained attention. Together, these findings illustrate how a multidimensional approach can disentangle surprise responses from longer-lasting attentional and affective processes, providing a robust framework for assessing emotion in infancy.

标题：社会情境中婴儿惊讶的多维度分析：生理、行为及面部表情标志研究

摘要：惊讶是早期学习的基石，但在前语言婴儿中识别惊讶具有挑战性，因为其许多标志与注意力或社会参与混杂在一起。我们旨在通过行为和生理测量识别特异性于惊讶的指标。99名14-22个月大的婴儿观察了五次工具使用演示，这些演示以中性或惊讶方式呈现。我们测量了社会注视、惊讶的面部表情、冻结行为、心率和皮电活动，分别在刺激后1秒和3秒时间点。使用贝叶斯混合效应模型和因子分析来区分惊讶与持续注意或情感。注视实验者的时长是最可靠的惊讶指标：在惊讶条件下，婴儿注视实验者的时间比中性条件下更长，尤其是在第一次演示后。惊讶的面部表情和冻结行为在惊讶条件下的水平高于中性条件，但它们在多次演示中的持续性表明，这些指标反映了持续注意而非惊讶本身。心率作为惊讶相关唤醒的相关指标出现，与社会注视时长的模式相似，而皮电活动呈现出不同的特征，在中性条件下反应更大，并与减少的注视反应相关，被解释为挫败或疲劳的指标。因子分析通过分离与惊讶和持续注意相关的不同测量簇，为此解释提供了聚合证据。综合来看，这些发现说明多维度方法如何能够将惊讶反应与更持久的注意和情感过程区分开来，为评估婴儿期情绪提供了稳健的框架。

关键词：婴儿惊讶；社会注视；生理测量；面部表情；多维度分析

title: Feeling Blue or Seeing Red? Similar Patterns of Emotion Associations With Colour Patches and Colour Terms
summary: For many, colours convey affective meaning. Popular opinion assumes that perception of colour is crucial to influence emotions. However, scientific studies test colour–emotion relationships by presenting colours as patches or terms. When using patches, researchers put great effort into colour presentation. When using terms, researchers have much less control over the colour participants think of. In this between-subjects study, we tested whether emotion associations with colour differ between terms and patches. Participants associated 20 emotion concepts, loading on valence, arousal, and power dimensions, with 12 colours presented as patches ( n = 54) or terms ( n = 78). We report high similarity in the pattern of associations of specific emotion concepts with terms and patches ( r = .82), for all colours except purple ( r = .−23). We also observed differences for black, which is associated with more negative emotions and of higher intensity when presented as a term than a patch. Terms and patches differed little in terms of valence, arousal, and power dimensions. Thus, results from studies on colour–emotion relationships using colour terms or patches should be largely comparable. It is possible that emotions are associated with colour concepts rather than particular perceptions or words of colour.

标题：蓝色忧郁还是红色怒火？颜色色块与颜色词汇在情绪关联中的相似模式
摘要：对于许多人而言，颜色传达着情感意义。大众观点认为，对颜色的感知对影响情绪至关重要。然而，科学研究通常通过呈现色块或颜色词汇来测试颜色与情绪的关系。使用色块时，研究者需投入大量精力进行颜色呈现；而使用词汇时，研究者对参与者所想象的颜色控制力较弱。在本项被试间研究中，我们测试了情绪与颜色的关联是否因颜色呈现方式（色块 vs. 词汇）而不同。参与者将20个涵盖效价、唤醒度和权力维度的情绪概念，与以色块形式（n=54）或词汇形式（n=78）呈现的12种颜色进行关联。结果显示，除紫色外（r=-.23），特定情绪概念与词汇和色块的关联模式高度相似（r=.82）。我们还观察到黑色存在差异：作为词汇呈现时，其关联的情绪更为消极且强度更高。在效价、唤醒度和权力维度上，词汇与色块差异不大。因此，使用颜色词汇或色块研究颜色-情绪关系的结果在很大程度上应具有可比性。情绪可能与颜色概念（而非特定的颜色知觉或颜色描述词）相关联。
关键词：情绪关联；颜色感知；颜色词汇；效价；唤醒度

title: Do People Know How Their Romantic Partner Views Their Emotions? Evidence for Emotion Meta-Accuracy and Links with Momentary Romantic Relationship Quality
summary:
Do people know how their romantic partner (i.e., the perceiver) views the self’s (i.e., the metaperceiver’s) emotions, displaying emotion meta-accuracy? Is it relevant to relationship quality? Using a sample of romantic couples (
                    N
                    couples
                    = 189), we found evidence for two types of emotion meta-accuracy across three different interactions: (a)
                    normative emotion meta-accuracy
                    , knowing perceivers’ impressions of metaperceivers’ emotions that are in line with how the average person may feel, and (b)
                    distinctive emotion meta-accuracy
                    , knowing perceivers’ unique impression of metaperceivers’ emotions. Furthermore, across interactions, normative emotion meta-accuracy was positively related to momentary relationship quality for metaperceivers and perceivers and this link was especially strong in the conflict interaction. Distinctive emotion meta-accuracy was negatively related to momentary relationship quality across interactions for perceivers and in the conflict interaction for metaperceivers. Overall, it may be adaptive for metaperceivers to accurately infer perceivers’ normative impressions and to remain blissfully unaware of their unique impressions.

标题：人们是否知道自己的浪漫伴侣如何看待他们的情绪？情绪元准确性及其与瞬时浪漫关系质量的证据  
摘要：人们是否知道自己的浪漫伴侣（即感知者）如何看待自我（即元感知者）的情绪，从而表现出情绪元准确性？这与关系质量相关吗？通过对189对浪漫伴侣样本在三种不同互动情境中的研究，我们发现了两种情绪元准确性的证据：（a）规范性情绪元准确性，即了解感知者符合普通人感受的情绪印象；（b）独特性情绪元准确性，即了解感知者对元感知者情绪的独特印象。此外，在各种互动中，规范性情绪元准确性与元感知者和感知者的瞬时关系质量呈正相关，尤其是在冲突互动中这种关联更强。独特性情绪元准确性与感知者在所有互动中的瞬时关系质量呈负相关，并与元感知者在冲突互动中的瞬时关系质量呈负相关。总体而言，元感知者准确推断感知者的规范性印象，同时对其独特印象保持“幸福的不知情”可能是适应性的。  
关键词：情绪元准确性；浪漫关系质量；规范性准确性；独特性准确性；社会认知

title: Anger instability and aggression in Borderline Personality Disorder – an ecological momentary assessment study
summary:
Abstract
                Background
                Anger and aggression are core features of Borderline Personality Disorder (BPD), contributing strongly to the individual as well as the societal burden caused by the disorder. Across studies, patients with BPD have shown increased, more frequent and prolonged episodes of anger and reported an increased prevalence of reactive aggression. However, only a few studies have investigated anger and aggression in the patients’ everyday lives and did not consider anger instability. In order to contribute knowledge about aggression and its association with anger intensity and anger instability in real-life in BPD the aim of the present study was to better characterize days with and without aggressive behaviors with regard to the patients’ experienced anger.
              
                Methods
                Patients with BPD and high aggression as well as healthy participants took part in an ecological momentary assessment (EMA) study assessing state anger and aggression three times per day over two weeks. Multilevel modeling was conducted and anger instability was operationalized by squared successive differences.
              
                Results
                As expected, patients with BPD reported greater instability in their experienced anger compared to healthy participants. Most interestingly, in the BPD group the occurrence of aggressive behavior was significantly associated with anger intensity as well as anger instability. More precisely, on days when patients with BPD acted out aggressively, they reported higher anger intensity as well as greater anger instability than on days when they did not act out aggressively.
              
                Conclusion
                Knowledge about what characterizes days with aggressive behaviors may help to improve interventions to reduce aggressive behavior and thus relieve the burden aggression causes for patients with BPD, their surroundings and society.

标题：边缘型人格障碍中的愤怒不稳定性与攻击行为——一项生态瞬时评估研究
摘要：背景：愤怒和攻击行为是边缘型人格障碍（BPD）的核心特征，对患者个人及社会造成的负担有重要影响。多项研究显示，BPD患者表现出更频繁、更持久的愤怒发作，并报告有更高比例的反应性攻击行为。然而，仅有少数研究在患者日常生活中调查了愤怒和攻击行为，且未考虑愤怒不稳定性。为增进对BPD患者真实生活中攻击行为及其与愤怒强度和愤怒不稳定性关联的认识，本研究旨在更好地描述伴有和不伴有攻击行为的日子中患者所体验到的愤怒特征。方法：高攻击性的BPD患者和健康参与者参加了一项生态瞬时评估（EMA）研究，每天三次评估状态愤怒和攻击行为，持续两周。采用多层模型进行分析，并通过连续差异的平方来操作化愤怒不稳定性。结果：与预期一致，BPD患者报告的愤怒不稳定性高于健康参与者。最有趣的是，在BPD组中，攻击行为的发生与愤怒强度及愤怒不稳定性显著相关。具体而言，在患者表现出攻击行为的日子里，他们报告了更高的愤怒强度和更大的愤怒不稳定性，相较于未表现出攻击行为的日子。结论：了解攻击行为发生日的特征可能有助于改进干预措施以减少攻击行为，从而减轻攻击行为对BPD患者、其周围环境及社会造成的负担。
关键词：边缘型人格障碍；愤怒不稳定性；攻击行为；生态瞬时评估；情绪

title: Emotion Regulation Difficulties Mediate Associations Between Betrayal Trauma and Symptoms of Posttraumatic Stress, Depression, and Anxiety
summary: Emotion regulation difficulties following trauma exposure have received increasing attention among researchers and clinicians. Previous work highlights the role of emotion regulation difficulties in multiple forms of psychological distress and identifies emotion regulation capacities as especially compromised among survivors of betrayal trauma: physical, sexual, or emotional maltreatment perpetrated by someone to whom the victim is close, such as a parent or partner. It is unknown, however, whether links between emotion regulation difficulties and psychological symptoms differ following exposure to betrayal trauma as compared with other trauma types. In the present study, 593 male and female university undergraduates completed the Difficulties with Emotion Regulation Scale (Gratz & Roemer, 2004), the Brief Betrayal Trauma Scale (Goldberg & Freyd, 2006), the Impact of Event Scale (Horowitz, Wilner, & Alvarez, 1979), and the Trauma Symptom Checklist (Elliott & Briere, 1992). A path analytic model demonstrated that betrayal trauma indirectly impacted symptoms of intrusion (β = .11), avoidance (β = .13), depression (β = .17), and anxiety (β = .14) via emotion regulation difficulties, an effect consistent with mediation. Emotion regulation difficulties did not mediate the relationship between other trauma exposure and psychological symptoms. Results may inform treatment‐matching efforts, and suggest that emotion regulation difficulties may constitute a key therapeutic target following betrayal trauma.

标题：情绪调节困难在背叛创伤与创伤后应激、抑郁及焦虑症状之间的中介作用
摘要：创伤暴露后的情绪调节困难越来越受到研究人员和临床医生的关注。以往研究强调了情绪调节困难在多种心理困扰中的作用，并指出在背叛创伤（即由受害者亲近的人，如父母或伴侣实施的躯体、性或情感虐待）的幸存者中，情绪调节能力尤其受损。然而，尚不清楚与其他创伤类型相比，背叛创伤暴露后情绪调节困难与心理症状之间的联系是否存在差异。本研究对593名男女大学生进行了评估，使用了情绪调节困难量表（Gratz & Roemer, 2004）、简要背叛创伤量表（Goldberg & Freyd, 2006）、事件影响量表（Horowitz, Wilner, & Alvarez, 1979）以及创伤症状清单（Elliott & Briere, 1992）。路径分析模型显示，背叛创伤通过情绪调节困难间接影响闯入（β = .11）、回避（β = .13）、抑郁（β = .17）和焦虑（β = .14）症状，这一效应符合中介作用。情绪调节困难并未在其他创伤暴露与心理症状之间发挥中介作用。研究结果可为治疗匹配策略提供参考，并提示情绪调节困难可能是背叛创伤后关键的治疗靶点。
关键词：情绪调节困难；背叛创伤；创伤后应激；抑郁；焦虑

title: Emotion network density is a potential clinical marker for anxiety and depression: Comparison of ecological momentary assessment and daily diary
summary:
Objectives
                    Using two intensive longitudinal data sets with different timescales (90 minutes, daily), we examined emotion network density, a metric of emotional inflexibility, as a predictor of clinical‐level anxiety and depression.
                  
                  
                    Design
                    Mobile‐based intensive longitudinal assessments.
                  
                  
                    Methods
                    119 participants (61 anxious and depressed, 58 healthy controls) completed ecological momentary assessment (EMA) to rate a variety of negative (NE) and positive emotions (PE) 9 times per day for 8 days using a mobile phone application. 169 participants (97 anxious and depressed and 72 healthy controls) completed an online daily diary on their NE and PE for 50 days. Multilevel vector autoregressive models were run to compute NE and PE network densities in each data set.
                  
                  
                    Results
                    In the EMA data set, both NE and PE network densities significantly predicted participants’ diagnostic status above and beyond demographics and the mean and standard deviation of NE and PE. Greater NE network density and lower PE network density were associated with anxiety and depression diagnoses. In the daily diary data set, NE and PE network densities did not significantly predict the diagnostic status.
                  
                  
                    Conclusions
                    Greater inflexibility of NE and lower inflexibility of PE, indexed by emotion network density, are potential clinical markers of anxiety and depressive disorders when assessed at intra‐daily levels as opposed to daily levels. Considering emotion network density, as well as the mean level and variability of emotions in daily life, may contribute to diagnostic prediction of anxiety and depressive disorders.
                  
                  
                    Practitioner points
                    
                      
                        
                          Emotion network density, or the degree to which prior emotions predict and influence current emotions, indicates an inflexible or change‐resistant emotion system.
                        
                        
                          Emotional inflexibility or change resistance over a few hours, but not daily, may characterize anxiety and depressive disorders.
                        
                        
                          Inflexible negative emotion systems are associated with anxiety and depressive disorders, whereas inflexible positive emotion systems may indicate psychological health.
                        
                        
                          Considering emotional inflexibility within days may provide additional information beyond demographics and mean level and variability of emotions in daily life for detecting anxiety and depressive disorders.

标题：情绪网络密度是焦虑和抑郁的潜在临床标志：生态瞬时评估与日常日记的比较
摘要：目的：通过使用两种不同时间尺度（90分钟、每日）的密集纵向数据集，我们考察了情绪网络密度（情绪僵化性的一个指标）作为临床水平焦虑和抑郁的预测因子。设计：基于手机的密集纵向评估。方法：119名参与者（61名焦虑抑郁患者，58名健康对照）完成了生态瞬时评估，每天通过手机应用程序对多种负性情绪和正性情绪进行9次评估，持续8天。169名参与者（97名焦虑抑郁患者，72名健康对照）完成为期50天的在线日常日记，记录其负性情绪和正性情绪。采用多层向量自回归模型计算每个数据集中负性情绪和正性情绪的网络密度。结果：在生态瞬时评估数据集中，负性情绪和正性情绪网络密度均显著预测参与者的诊断状态，且超越人口统计学变量以及负性情绪和正性情绪的均值与标准差。较高的负性情绪网络密度和较低的正性情绪网络密度与焦虑和抑郁诊断相关。在日常日记数据集中，负性情绪和正性情绪网络密度未能显著预测诊断状态。结论：以情绪网络密度为指标，负性情绪的较高僵化性和正性情绪的较低僵化性，在日内水平（而非日间水平）评估时，是焦虑和抑郁障碍的潜在临床标志。考虑情绪网络密度以及日常生活中情绪的均值和变异性，可能有助于焦虑和抑郁障碍的诊断预测。实践要点：情绪网络密度，即先前情绪预测和影响当前情绪的程度，指示一个僵化或抗拒改变的情绪系统。数小时内的情绪僵化性或抗拒改变，而非每日的，可能是焦虑和抑郁障碍的特征。僵化的负性情绪系统与焦虑和抑郁障碍相关，而僵化的正性情绪系统可能表明心理健康。考虑日内情绪僵化性，可为检测焦虑和抑郁障碍提供超出人口统计学变量以及日常生活中情绪的均值和变异性的额外信息。

关键词：情绪网络密度；情绪僵化性；焦虑；抑郁；生态瞬时评估

title: Personality Expression and Impression Formation in Online Social Networks: An Integrative Approach to Understanding the Processes of Accuracy, Impression Management and Meta–Accuracy
summary: In this paper, we investigate personality expression and impression formation processes in online social networks (OSNs). We explore whether, when and why people accurately judge others’ personalities (accuracy), successfully manage the impressions that others form of them (impression management) and accurately infer others’ impressions of them (meta–accuracy) at zero acquaintance. On the basis of targets’ OSN profiles (N = 103), overall perceiver impressions were collected and compared with targets’ self–view, desired impression and meta–perception. In addition, independent groups of thin–slice perceivers based their personality impressions solely on one of four kinds of information within the OSN profiles (profile picture, interests field, group list and notice board), and more than 300 OSN cues (e.g. attractive person and number of friends) were coded. Results showed evidence of accuracy, impression management and meta–accuracy, but their extent was moderated by the trait (e.g. Big Five and self–esteem), the kind of information and the interplay of trait and information. Findings could be explained by cue expression and cue utilization processes (lens model analyses). Future prospects for studying personality impressions in online and offline environments are discussed. Copyright © 2013 European Association of Personality Psychology.

标题：在线社交网络中的人格表达与印象形成：理解准确性、印象管理与元准确性过程的整合方法  
摘要：本文研究在线社交网络中人格表达与印象形成的过程。我们探讨了在零相识情境下，人们是否、何时以及为何能准确判断他人人格（准确性）、成功管理他人对自己形成的印象（印象管理）以及准确推断他人对自己的印象（元准确性）。基于目标对象的在线社交网络个人资料（N=103），收集了整体感知者的印象，并与目标对象的自我认知、期望印象及元感知进行了比较。此外，独立的薄片感知者群体仅依据在线社交网络个人资料中的四类信息（个人资料照片、兴趣领域、群组列表和公告板）形成人格印象，并对300多个在线社交网络线索（例如有吸引力的人、好友数量）进行了编码。结果表明，准确性、印象管理和元准确性均存在证据，但其程度受人格特质（如大五人格和自尊）、信息类型以及特质与信息的交互作用调节。这些发现可通过线索表达与线索利用过程（透镜模型分析）来解释。本文还讨论了在线与离线环境中研究人格印象的未来前景。版权所有©2013欧洲人格心理学协会。  
关键词：人格表达；印象形成；准确性；印象管理；元准确性

title: Attentive immobility in the face of inevitable distal threat—Startle potentiation and fear bradycardia as an index of emotion and attention
summary: AbstractDuring fear conditioning, a cue (CS) signals an inevitable distal threat (US) and evokes a conditioned response that can be described as attentive immobility (freezing). The organism remains motionless and monitors the source of danger while startle responses are potentiated, indicating a state of defensive hypervigilance. Although in animals vagally mediated fear bradycardia is also reliably observed under such circumstances, results are mixed in human fear conditioning. Using a single‐cue fear conditioning and extinction protocol, we tested cardiac reactivity and startle potentiation indexing low‐level defensive strategies in a fear‐conditioned (n = 40; paired presentations of CS and US) compared with a non‐conditioned control group (n = 40; unpaired presentations of CS and US). Additionally, we assessed shock expectancy ratings on a trial‐by‐trial basis indexing declarative knowledge of the previous contingencies. Half of each group underwent extinction under sham or active transcutaneous vagus nerve stimulation (tVNS), serving as additional proof of concept. We found stronger cardiac deceleration during CS presentation in the fear learning relative to the control group. This learned fear bradycardia was positively correlated with conditioned startle potentiation but not with declarative knowledge of CS‐US contingencies. TVNS abolished differences in heart rate changes between both groups and removed the significant correlation between late cardiac deceleration and startle potentiation in the fear learning group. Results suggest, fear‐conditioned cues evoke attentive immobility in humans, characterized by cardiac deceleration and startle potentiation. Such defensive response pattern is elicited by cues predicting inevitable distal threat and resembles conditioned fear responses observed in rodents.

标题：面对不可避免的远端威胁时的注意性不动——惊恐增强与恐惧性心动过缓作为情绪与注意的指标
摘要：在恐惧条件化过程中，一个线索（CS）预示着不可避免的远端威胁（US），并诱发一种可描述为注意性不动（僵直）的条件性反应。生物体保持静止，监测危险来源，同时惊恐反应增强，表明处于防御性过度警觉状态。尽管在动物中，迷走神经介导的恐惧性心动过缓在此类情况下也可可靠观察到，但在人类恐惧条件化研究中结果尚不一致。通过使用单线索恐惧条件化和消退范式，我们比较了恐惧条件化组（n=40；CS与US配对呈现）和非条件化对照组（n=40；CS与US非配对呈现）中反映低水平防御策略的心率反应与惊恐增强。此外，我们逐试次评估了电击预期评级，以反映对先前条件性关联的陈述性知识。每组一半受试者在假性刺激或主动经皮迷走神经刺激（tVNS）条件下进行消退，作为额外概念验证。我们发现，与对照组相比，恐惧学习组在CS呈现期间出现更强的心率减缓。这种习得的恐惧性心动过缓与条件化惊恐增强呈正相关，但与CS-US关联的陈述性知识无关。TVNS消除了两组之间心率变化的差异，并消除了恐惧学习组晚期心率减缓与惊恐增强之间的显著相关性。结果表明，恐惧条件化线索可诱发人类的注意性不动，其特征为心率减缓与惊恐增强。这种防御性反应模式由预示着不可避免远端威胁的线索引发，与在啮齿动物中观察到的条件化恐惧反应相似。
关键词：恐惧条件化；注意性不动；惊恐增强；恐惧性心动过缓；经皮迷走神经刺激

title: The Theory of Constructed Emotion: More Than a Feeling
summary:
A recently published article by van Heijst et al. attempted to reconcile two research approaches in the science of emotion—basic emotion theory and the theory of constructed emotion—by suggesting that the former explains
                    emotions
                    as bioregulatory states of the body whereas the latter explains
                    feelings
                    that arise from those state changes. This bifurcation of emotion into objective physical states and subjective feelings involves three misleading simplifications that fundamentally misrepresent the theory of constructed emotion and prevent progress in the science of emotion. In this article we identify these misleading simplifications and the resulting factual errors, empirical oversights, and evolutionary oversimplifications. We then discuss why such errors will continue to arise until scientists realize that the two theories are intrinsically irreconcilable. They rest on incommensurate assumptions and require different methods of evaluation. Only by directly considering these differences will these research silos in the science of emotion finally dissolve, speeding the accumulation of trustworthy scientific knowledge about emotion that is usable in the real world.
translation:
相关性：是
标题：建构情绪理论：不止是一种感觉
摘要：van Heijst等人最近发表的一篇文章试图调和情绪科学中的两种研究方法——基本情绪理论与建构情绪理论，认为前者将情绪解释为身体的生物调节状态，而后者则解释由这些状态变化产生的情感。这种将情绪划分为客观生理状态与主观情感的二分法涉及三个具有误导性的简化，从根本上歪曲了建构情绪理论，并阻碍了情绪科学的进展。在本文中，我们识别了这些误导性简化及其导致的实证错误、经验性忽视和演化上的过度简化。随后，我们讨论了为何这些错误会持续出现，直到科学家意识到这两种理论本质上不可调和。它们基于不可通约的假设，需要不同的评估方法。只有直接审视这些差异，情绪科学中的这些研究壁垒才能最终消解，从而加速积累可在现实世界中使用的、可信的情绪科学知识。
关键词：建构情绪理论；基本情绪理论；情绪科学；情绪状态；情感体验
